programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Hoopin' Hopper/ A Chopsticky Situation
programme.desc: When Andy loses his basketball in Beijing, he learns that although competitive sports are fun, friendship is more important than winning.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Dance Problem/ Follow the Bouncing Ball
programme.desc: Peg and Cat dance with their idol Misty Copeland, but Cat's tail becomes a big obstacle. Cat chases his favorite ball as it bounces through ten different worlds to ten different beats.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Tiger Family Trip
programme.desc: The Tiger Family takes a road trip to see Grandpere, they sing and play games, enjoy a dinosaur-themed playground, and explore a butterfly garden on their way.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Hey! Sesame Street News
programme.desc: Cookie Monster becomes a journalist for Abby and Big Bird's newspaper, 'Hey Sesame Street News!'.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Slumber Party/ Puptastic
programme.desc: Pinkalicious and her friends imagine a friendly pink dragon at a Princess of Pink slumber party.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Pies
programme.desc: In the Signature, the bakers must master a perfect Wellington. The fiendishly difficult Technical challenge, hand-raised pies, proves the downfall of many. American pies are the Showstopper feature.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Grantchester
programme.desc: Sidney’s former flame throws an engagement party that leads to murder. To crack the case, Sidney and Geordie must break a code of silence.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: My Mother and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Find out if Nurse Tillie can come to the rescue in time and see why stolen paint provokes a theological crisis. Capt. Dreyfuss gives Rose a heads-up.

programme.title: The Lawrence Welk Show: This Colorful World
programme.desc: Sandi Griffiths hosts this feature of songs that have the word 'colour' in their title.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dolls
programme.desc: The detectives search for a killer after the body of a sexually molested girl is found.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Waste
programme.desc: The detectives learn that a doctor is impregnating comatose female patients with a wealthy donor's sperm to obtain biologically compatible embryonic stem cells.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Beast's Obsession
programme.desc: William Lewis breaks out of prison, continues his killing spree and takes a 12-year-old girl hostage in an effort to lure Sergeant Benson to him. With time running out, Benson must decide how much she is willing to sacrifice in order to save the child.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Post-Mortem Blues
programme.desc: In the moments after William Lewis' death, Sergeant Benson is rescued by the SVU squad, but her torment continues. The Internal Affairs investigation of her actions is deemed inconclusive, and with no evidence to corroborate her story, she risks arrest.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Thought Criminal
programme.desc: Under the guidance of Lieutenant Murphy, Sergeant Benson and the SVU take an active approach to catching sex offenders. They target Simon Wilkes, a well-regarded photographer with a secret life.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Maternal Instincts
programme.desc: Rollins' mother Beth throws her a baby shower while the SVU reports to a four-star hotel where a famous violinist was raped by her colleague. The investigation leads to the shocking return of Rollins' sister Kim.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Sketchy Area
programme.desc: Phil stumbles into an exciting new career after dropping by Luke's college; while Claire deals with her dad, Jay, and the merger of Pritchett's Closets with a tech-savvy, hipper company.

programme.title: Modern Family: Torn Between Two Lovers
programme.desc: Haley can't seem to choose between her past and present relationships and is forced to decide. Meanwhile, Manny returns to college and dorm life while his girlfriend, Sherry, continues to stay at Jay and Gloria's.

programme.title: Modern Family: Bixby's Back
programme.desc: To avoid becoming a boring couple, Phil and Claire revisit a roleplaying rendezvous from the previous Valentine's Day. Meanwhile, Jay plans an elaborate surprise for Gloria, and an admirer comes between Cameron and Mitchell on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: Did the Chicken Cross the Road?
programme.desc: When Cam forgets the words to his favourite country song, he blames Mitch and decides he needs to reconnect with his roots and get a chicken. Meanwhile, Alex is up for a prestigious government job that requires a family interview.

programme.title: Modern Family: Kids These Days
programme.desc: Haley needs a little motherly advice from Claire as she considers her future with Dylan and her career. Meanwhile, Jay and Cam’s less than politically correct coaching style earns them a class on sensitivity.

programme.title: Modern Family: Putting Down Roots
programme.desc: Dede's husband, Jerry, comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they really know what to do with, Jay and Gloria feel sorry for Jerry and invite him to stay with them while he is in town.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Moving Day
programme.desc: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own as they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. Meanwhile, Pameron gets out of prison early and has a bone to pick with Mitchell.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blasts From the Past
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before they become grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mom who has an interesting past.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb
programme.desc: While out on a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers find themselves under attack by a violent robbery crew which quickly becomes a full-scale shoot-out.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K
programme.desc: While responding to a call of shots fired, Voight, Antonio and Halstead come across a secret battered women's shelter and discover the owner has been wounded.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: If We Were Normal
programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Lady Heather's Box
programme.desc: Grissom is attracted to Lady Heather, until he learns that she is a murder suspect.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Spiral
programme.desc: While Callen is undercover in the mail room of an office building to investigate an arms dealer, it is taken over by terrorists and Callen becomes a hostage. When the team arrives to help, they discover the entire building is wired with explosives.

programme.title: NCIS: Iceman
programme.desc: The team investigates when a marine thought to have frozen to death wakes up on Ducky's autopsy table. With the young man on life support, the team tracks his movements in the day before he was left for dead and discovers a secret trip to Baghdad.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman is found with multiple gunshot wounds, Intelligence discovers this case may be connected with several other cases, and they uncover a serial killer is working in Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
programme.desc: When a mutilated sex offender is found dead, it is unclear if he was the victim of a crime. As intelligence questions those related to the case, they find themselves up against a special police force that may be covering up illegal activities.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Juvenile
programme.desc: A drug raid uncovers the body of a suspected marijuana dealer, who was raped and stabbed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Resilience
programme.desc: When a rape victim attempts to commit suicide, the detectives vehemently search for her rapists.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa vs. Malibu Stacey

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's First Word

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part

programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to come up with a way out of attending their friend's wedding.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys build bridges, teach predator deterrent techniques and build a snow-proof greenhouse to save a single mom and her daughter from a rampaging moose and secure them a food source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Paydirt or Bust
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin are called to renovate a mine's machine shop for mining to begin generating income. With 57 veins that could average a profit of upwards of $250,000 a day, the guys must negotiate a deal that could be their biggest payoff yet.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Pacific Coast Perch
programme.desc: Pro-builder Mark Smith is building an off-grid modular home stooped high on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. The pressure is on as even the smallest mistake can result in the home tumbling 85 feet down into the ocean.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Hill of Death
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. Marty risks all forming a road up a bedrock cliff to a forest crawling with mountain lions.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Paydirt or Bust
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin are called to renovate a mine's machine shop for mining to begin generating income. With 57 veins that could average a profit of upwards of $250,000 a day, the guys must negotiate a deal that could be their biggest payoff yet.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Pacific Coast Perch
programme.desc: Pro-builder Mark Smith is building an off-grid modular home stooped high on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. The pressure is on as even the smallest mistake can result in the home tumbling 85 feet down into the ocean.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: When Cows Attack
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Yes, cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build, and the race is on to finish the project before father Paul must leave for work.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Cash Cab: Shark Week Edition
programme.desc: Ben tests the nautical knowledge of a group of Sailors, Best Friends and a family of three as they try their luck in the Cash Cab.

programme.title: Cash Cab: NYPD Blues
programme.desc: Four siblings impress Ben.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Dozer Dave Returns
programme.desc: Dave Turin, a former 'Gold Rush' miner, sets out on his own prospecting for an abandoned gold mine to reopen. When an investor backs out, Dave has to decide if he's willing to risk his family's life savings on his ability to bring home the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment and a team of amateur miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery
programme.desc: Dave faces a nightmare scenario when the ground he's mining goes cold and no one knows why. With his season hanging in the balance, the pressure mounts for Dave to get them back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: Fred and his crew return to the glory hole to complete unfinished business. Dustin's crew strikes gold, but are blocked by massive boulders and must engineer an insane system of winches and pulleys to go deeper and get down to bedrock.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Superclaw
programme.desc: The Dakota boys bank their first gold hauls of the season. Dustin invents a custom super claw to remove massive boulders from his plunge pool. Fred and his crew are confronted by a deadly cable malfunction.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury, forcing him to take a calculated risk that nearly turns deadly. After his luck turns, Fred's dives on his 76th birthday to decode a bedrock gold mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Gold Cave
programme.desc: Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions. Fred and his crew head upstream into a mini-waterfall to find a huge deposit of gold, but first they have to move their 700lb dredge up dangerous rapids.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Nugget Heaven
programme.desc: Dustin Hurt hits bedrock and a pile of nuggets at Rainbow's End. Fred chases the gold upstream into a dangerous new spot, forcing him to rethink his plans.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Thunder Falls
programme.desc: Dustin's on the best ground he's dredged when a new discovery opens the door to even more gold. Fred faces a life-and-death situation opening new ground at Thunder Falls.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: It's Just Money
programme.desc: With no budget in mind, Kandice comes from Texas to find a blingy dress for her vow renewal ceremony.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'll Know It When I See It
programme.desc: Bride Brooke wants a unique, one of kind gown, and won't settle for anything less. Bling queen Amanda hopes to add even more bling to her wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You ARE a Daredevil!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Italian Food Matter

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.desc: A smokehouse master and a Californian take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Windy City Wants More
programme.desc: Toronto's David Adjey and Chicago's Cory Morris determine whether Chopped judge Scott Conant or Internet star Hannah Hart will go up against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Revenge Is Best Served Bold
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's former co-worker Leia Gaccione and Asian expert Tony Nguyen are back for more, returning to the arena for a second chance to take Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sticky Situation
programme.desc: The competition sweetens up when pastry chefs Clarice Lam and Avery Ruzicka heat up the ovens for the chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck
programme.desc: It's all hands-on deck when Napa Valley's Daniel Gomez Sanchez competes against Atlanta's Matthew Ridgway. TV host Daphne Oz and Food Network's Eddie Jackson hold nothing back when it comes to slaying Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Choc-O-Love
programme.desc: Alton Brown and Valerie Bertinelli don't want a rocky road on the way to beating Bobby Flay. They use their chocolate expertise to decide whether acclaimed pastry chef David Lebovitz or chef-of-all-trades Ryan Scott will be able to fight Bobby.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine's in for a 2-in-1 challenge when he's tasked with fixing the Zest Bistro, located inside the Lemon Tree Grocer in Downers Grove, Ill.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: In 2012, Robert met his match in one of the owners of Woody’s, a steakhouse in Tupelo. With over half a million in debt, Robert forced the mother-daughter team to take a hard look in the mirror. He returns to see if the business is still going.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: At Perella's Ristorante in Warren, R.I., Chef Robert Irvine meets an owner whose stubbornness is holding back his restaurant. He hasn't updated the menu, the decor or his opinions since the place opened 25 years ago.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Pioneering Ordeal
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli links up with the Pioneer Woman, Ree Drummond, to orchestrate a loss. Two southern gentlemen, Atlanta's Jamarium Banks and Vince Giancarlo from Charlotte, North Carolina won't be playing nice as they try to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Meatless Marvels
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has stocked her kitchen with all the ingredients to make some of her favorite meatless meals, and she's whipping up broccoli cheese baked potatoes, Greek grilled eggplant steaks and roasted vegetable panzanella.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Portable Food
programme.desc: It's food on the move with Ina Garten as she shares pro tips for perfect portable eats. She makes moist lemon poppy seed cake for an afternoon snack at work and tomato mozzarella pan bagnat.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Fearless Food
programme.desc: Ina Garten is tackling daunting dishes with easy techniques, from a perfectly risen souffle a l'orange to overcoming pastry fears with her totally professional-looking Anna's tomato tart.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Make-Ahead Breakfast
programme.desc: Ina prepares a breakfast that includes raspberry baked French toast and mini Italian frittatas.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cooking For Jeffrey: It Must Be Friday
programme.desc: Ina Garten's shaking things up, making Skillet-Roasted Lemon Chicken and serving it with amped-up Roasted Broccolini on the side.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Deans for Dinner
programme.desc: Ina Garten's throwing a celebration meal for her friend Deborah Berke, who has been named the Dean of the Yale Architecture School. She's making a sensational paella salad, a platter of goat cheese, English oat crackers and fig preserves.

programme.title: Mary McCartney Serves It Up: Burgers, Brownies and Slaw with Stanley Tucci
programme.desc: It's the most delicious invite in London as passionate vegetarian Mary McCartney puts her own spin on American classics for lunch with her friend Stanley Tucci. Mary shares family stories while making black bean burgers, thousand island dressing and more.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Feeding the Boys
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing the dinners and sweet treats that her sons love the most. There are chocolate spreads decorated with all sorts of fun and crazy toppings for football camp kids, and breakfast quesadillas make an easy on-the-go meal for when Bryce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Meals: Pasta Pronto

programme.desc: By examining ancient cultures around the world, we find that nearly all revered certain animals and depicted their gods with animal traits.

programme.desc: When a welfare check on a local real-estate tycoon reveals a gruesome murder scene, investigators must sift through alleged drug use, revenge, and a case of mistaken identity to uncover a bombshell of a killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Valerie Nessler
programme.desc: When a deadly rumor is stirred up among friends and acquaintances, it sets off an explosion of brutal violence so gruesome that not even a house fire can hide the truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Brandy Stutzman
programme.desc: The murder of a U.S. Airman leads Las Vegas investigators down a twisted path to one woman's offbeat oasis and ties to an unusual fan club.

programme.desc: A crime novelist’s plot for her husband’s untimely death takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Dateline: Unimaginable

programme.title: Dateline: Betrayed
programme.desc: When a rising star attorney in South Florida is murdered, police investigate whether her death is connected to a web of fraud, betrayal and more than $1 billion in missing money. Dennis Murphy reports.

programme.title: Dateline: A Texas Twist
programme.desc: A recent high school graduate is miraculously found alive after she and her friend are brutally attacked just outside Corpus Christi, Texas.

programme.desc: A dedicated Air Force Captain who had been deployed overseas for long stretches found himself caught in the crossfire of a love triangle at home. Investigators discovered a tale of obsession and passion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Justice for Bonnie
programme.desc: When Bonnie Craig was found dead, police collected DNA but it didn't match anyone in the system. Then, twelve years later, there was a hit but the man was thousands of miles away. Turns out, prosecutors would need more than DNA to convict a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Bathtub Mystery

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on Hot Springs Drive
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a home invasion. Then, her best friend and neighbor is shot the following night. Investigators unearth disturbing secrets that suggest the cases may be linked.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Promise
programme.desc: When Cathy Torrez never came home after work, her family feared the worst. An intensive search ended after her car was found, with her body in the trunk. It take years to get to the truth.

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes

programme.title: The Simpsons: D'oh-in' in the Wind
programme.desc: On a personal quest, Homer digs into his mother's past and discovers his middle name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mona Leaves-A

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Midsummer's Nice Dream

programme.title: Black-ish: Black History Month

programme.title: Movie: Next
programme.desc: When a psychic Las Vegas magician has a vision of an upcoming terrorist attack, he is forced to decide between saving himself or saving the world.

programme.title: Movie: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: With monstrous creatures rising from the sea and a war waging on, a former pilot and a trainee are paired up to operate a special weapon in a desperate attempt to save the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains

programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space

programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: Unearthed: Finding Sparta's 300
programme.desc: New discoveries might lead investigators to the legendary group of 300 Spartan warriors who died fighting off one million invading Persians, and using cutting-edge tech, experts reconstruct the lost battlefield to uncover the secrets of their last stand.

programme.title: Unearthed: Wrath of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: New evidence reveals if Attila the Hun was responsible for the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Summit of the Gods
programme.desc: Go inside the Acropolis, an ancient engineering marvel that has stood above the city of Athens for thousands of years. Follow the scientists working to reveal its hidden mysteries: how it was built, what it looked like, and why it's still standing today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Examine new discoveries which are revealing the deepest and darkest secrets of Stonehenge, showing how ancient magic, bizarre rituals, and brutal murder built this strange monument.

programme.title: MythBusters: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: Jamie and Adam test a Hollywood lighting myth.

programme.title: MythBusters: The Reddit Special
programme.desc: From the very beginning, fan feedback has been integral to MythBusters. In this episode, the most interactive show on TV has peaked with a Reddit Special where the Internet is in complete control of the editorial.

programme.title: MythBusters: Bullet Baloney
programme.desc: The MythBusters take on five filmic firearm clichés: Will a bent-barreled shot gun fire? Can you fire a gun in space? Will a gun dropped in a deep fryer go off? What weird items will stop a bullet? And does a neon sign really explode when hit by a bullet?

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Full Moon Rising
programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Swamp Manhunt
programme.desc: An armed and dangerous fugitive from another parish tries to make his escape in the swamps.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Poached
programme.desc: Detectives come up with a creative plan to catch two dangerous alligator poachers red-handed.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Geaux Speed Racers
programme.desc: The deputies are called in to bust teens illegally street racing in the bayou. Deputy Marlin Meeks is dispatched to a disturbance at an old house that is rumoured to be haunted.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Mardi Gras
programme.desc: Deputies work around the clock in Terrebonne Parish, which is home to the second biggest Mardi Gras in the state.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: The Great Swamp Escape
programme.desc: When expensive shrimping nets are stolen, a swamp chase ensues in which the culprit, Deputy Thibodeaux's nephew, manages to escape.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Biker Thieves
programme.desc: An organized ring of motorcycle thieves has been striking every six months, stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of motorcycles in a single night.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Murder in Unit 14
programme.desc: An inmate collapses and dies from multiple stab wounds after an altercation inside the cellblock.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Shanked
programme.desc: An inmate with a shank sticking out of his stomach is rushed to the infirmary. Before losing consciousness, he gives the agents a lead on the case.

programme.title: Diabolical: Accident Waiting to Happen
programme.desc: Rainey Morin is a single mom who's finally found her soulmate. Robert Kowalski treats Rainey like a queen and her kids like gold, but beneath his bright veneer is a dark history threatening to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: Prichard AL is normally a quiet town but when the body of Re'Mano Campbell, a loving father, is found slain in his house the community grows apprehensive. And it'll take the cunning wit of local investigators to unravel the mystery of his murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Frozen Waters
programme.desc: When a mother and her two young children mysteriously go missing, her family goes to their home only to discover it empty. Then, two local boys nearby also disappear.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Frozen Waters
programme.desc: When a mother and her two young children mysteriously go missing, her family goes to their home only to discover it empty. Then, two local boys nearby also disappear.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Bitter Pills
programme.desc: Tampa grandmother Peggy Mehrman is much loved by friends and family. Peggy is forced to rely on the kindness of strangers when her heath declines, and when Peggy dies in her sleep, her daughter Janice's grief is soon transformed into suspicion.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: House of Horrors
programme.desc: In Sacramento, Dorothea Puente runs a boarding house. Mentally ill Alvaro 'Bert' Montoya is among Dorothea's favorite tenants. Until a terrible stench rises up through the rafters, and Bert unwittingly exposes something sinister… And deadly.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: The Jersey Devil
programme.desc: 16 year-old Brittney Gregory is a star student in Brick Township, New Jersey. When she vanishes one night in 2004, local police begin a search that leads them into a world of dark secrets and dangerous players as they work to solve her disappearance.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Checks and Balances
programme.desc: A prominent psychiatrist and his adult son are killed execution style. When police can't find a suspect, the case goes cold. But when an attempted armored car robbery provides an odd link to the double homicide months later, a motive is revealed.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Code of Silence
programme.desc: In St. Petersburg, Florida, Cabretti Wheeler and his friend Kyle Ellis are killed. When the only eye-witness vanishes, it's up to Cabretti's mom, Lisa Wheeler, to help police solve the case, even if it means risking her own life for justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Tragedy on TV
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the events surrounding the murder of Alison Parker and Adam Ward who were shot on live TV. 20/20 shares all new details from the 23-page suicide note Bryce Williams sent as well as a look inside the mind of the killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Mystery in Apartment 410
programme.desc: It is a Southern California mystery ripped straight from a Hollywood script, yet the actors in this drama are real, and so are the twists and turns that unfold in solving a double murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Million Dollar Christy
programme.desc: A female boxing Phenom enters a forbidden relationship with her trainer. But when another secret passion bubbles to the surface and she tries to leave his controlling grip, she finds herself fighting for her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Book of James
programme.desc: An affair between a married pastor and a member of his flock takes a shocking turn when he proposes a polygamous relationship with his wife. But an unexpected arrival threatens their pledge of secrecy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Lone Star Lust
programme.desc: A woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Family Matters
programme.desc: Puppy love is thwarted when a teen boy's traditional parents try to keep the young couple apart by moving him to another country. But the distance only serves to make his heart grow fonder and he'll stop at nothing to be reunited with his girl.

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Battling the Elements
programme.desc: Firefighter Jack Pritchard fearlessly charges into blazing infernos to rescue victims, and when Hurricane Katrina pounded New Orleans, John Keller stepped up to save residents of his apartment building.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stuck in Shelikof
programme.desc: Nick experiences firsthand just how dangerous living in Alaska can be while hunting for driftwood to build his fishing lodge and warehouse. Jere and Ben's 112-foot barge starts its half-mile journey to the water.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Pie's the Limit
programme.desc: From savory to sweet and cheesy to meaty, the pie possibilities are endless. Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit and cream pie in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Donuts For Days
programme.desc: Anyway you fry it, America loves donuts, and these three shops are a cut above the rest. There are vegan delights at Donut Friend in Los Angeles, with everything from berries and mint to donut sandwiches.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Deep Freeze
programme.desc: These frozen treats go far beyond vanilla, chocolate and strawberry scoots. In Honolulu, Shimazu Store pushes the boundaries of shave ice, a uniquely Hawaiian treat. In New York, Ice and Vice uses unconventional ingredients to create edgy desserts.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: L.A. Sweets
programme.desc: We've got the fried, the frozen, and the fabulous! It's a tour of the sweetest spots in Los Angeles. At Republique, French pastries are expertly crafted, and totally addictive.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Game Changers
programme.desc: Visit three of NYC's game changers, putting a new spin on old favorites. At Dominique Ansel Kitchen time is the secret ingredient.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Low Country Love
programme.desc: If you are looking for some Low Country Love in the form of a sweet treat, look no further than Charleston, South Carolina. At Callie's Hot Little Biscuit, they are baking up, over the top, warm doughy rounds like the Cinnamon Biscuit.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Start
programme.desc: At Holy Donut in Portland, Maine, the dough for their Maine blueberry donuts and sweet potato ginger glazed donuts includes mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Three-foot-tall Fairy Cake
programme.desc: Michelle is producing a six-foot-long miniature steam train made out of cake; Eloise is tasked with creating a three-foot-tall fairy cake for a toddler's birthday; Karisha is commissioned to make a wedding cake with nearly 900 edible iced flowers.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Leather-Bound Cake
programme.desc: A cake that looks identical to four, legal-bound volumes for a publishing company; a cake that is the same shape and size of a Shetland pony; a wedding cake specialist creates a cake that is over two foot tall.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cakes in Wonderland
programme.desc: Molly Robbins likes to push the boundaries. She's been asked to create a five-tier cake themed around Alice in Wonderland, complete with an edible Cheshire cat and a pouring teapot.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Ball Gown Celebration Cake
programme.desc: In Lancashire, Molly Robbins has a very tall order: a celebration cake for a flamboyant customer to help him celebrate 35 years as a drag artist. The cake will be a life-size ball gown, complete with 50 edible peacock feathers and 3000 gold flowers.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Carnivals, Cityscapes and Glowing Cakes
programme.desc: Romance combines with rides and roller coasters on a carnival-themed wedding cake complete with a tunnel of love.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Surprise Filled Cakes
programme.desc: A rancher's birthday party calls for a pair of larger-than-life cowboy boots. Next, the Texas Reptile Zoo celebrates with a realistic snake cake that blows everyone's mind. Finally, two special cakes are filled with hidden surprises.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Gravity-Defying Musical Cakes
programme.desc: A 50s-themed cake with a working jukebox is music to everyone's ears and an out-of-this-world wedding cake gets filled with hand-sculpted edible zombies! Next, an alligator groom's cake looks like it crawled right out of the swamp.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Out of This World Upside Down Cakes
programme.desc: An upside-down wedding cake hanging from a chandelier is covered in sparkly rhinestones for the big day, plus an edible truck jumps over a Vegas ghost town. The planet Earth is made of cake, and one baker creates a realistic, 3D motorcycle cake.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Matchmaking Party
programme.desc: Four bakers get in the mood in an aphrodisiac inspired cupcake challenge. One baker makes the judges swoon, while another totally turns off Florian and Candace.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Big Time Rush
programme.desc: Four bakers fight for the change to serve cupcakes backstage for Big Time Rush.

programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.desc: The friends show off their favourite letters.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Luck Charm/ Teed Off!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Monstrous Truck/ Minnie's Vacation Home!
programme.desc: Mickey accidentally turns his roadster into a monster truck! Daisy and Cuckoo Loca worry that Minnie is moving out!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: FlyAlong/RockABye Birdie
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Vampirina: Little Terror/ Super Natural
programme.desc: Vee and her friends volunteer to babysit for her baby cousin. When a family of ghost hunters comes to stay at the Scare B&B, Vee and her family spend the day trying to prove that their house is not haunted.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Smarty Goof/ Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and Gekko's Robot Rampage/ Owlette's Feathered Friend
programme.desc: When Romeo’s new robot, Robette, gets a screw lose she decides to take over the world by herself. Owlette finds a bird in HQ and decides that she’ll be the perfect pet owner.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Secret of the Pagoda/ Storm of the Ninja
programme.desc: While Catboy is too busy trying to impress An Yu, Night Ninja enters the pagoda. An Yu tries to solve an ancient riddle to become a true Mountain Master.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Upside-Down Day / Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: When Summer has a case of bad-day-itis, Gonzo's cure is turning the whole playroom upside down. Later, Animal loses a tooth but the Tooth Fairy didn't leave him anything.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Froginizer/ My Fair Animal
programme.desc: The Muppet Babies play superheroes. Piggy and Summer help Kermit discover his superpower.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won
programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Lionel: Saurus/ Catboy's Cuddly
programme.desc: Gekko’s pet, Lionel, becomes a huge monster wreaking havoc throughout the city. Catboy confesses to Owlette and Gekko that he has a cuddly toy.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moonstruck: Race to the Moon/ Moonstruck: Luna Fortress
programme.desc: The PJ Masks must travel to the moon to keep Luna Girl from improving her Luna Magnet powers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.desc: Mickey and crew journey to a waterfall to find Daisy's pet goldfish.

programme.desc: Summer and Piggy surprise their friends by building a blanket fort so large that it becomes a blanket kingdom. When Miss Nanny loses her earring, the Muppet Babies use their imaginations to turn into pirates and follow a treasure map to find it.

programme.desc: Martian Mickey pays a visit to the Clubhouse pals and participates in a special show and tell presentation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy the Great
programme.desc: Things start to go wrong before the show even begins when Goofy performs in a magic show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Puppy Sitting Adventure
programme.desc: Pluto's realizes that baby-sitting Clarabelle Cow's puppy isn't as easy as he thought.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Goofbot
programme.desc: Goofy needs some help building his toy robot for today's Toy Fair.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Mousekersize!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Space Captain Donald

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Ducks

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama

programme.desc: When pets are allowed to join their owners on a race, Pluto and Pete's dog Butch try to upstage each other. The Happy Helpers look after Pluto, and Figaro gets jealous.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Donald's Garage/ Artful Helpers

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mouse vs. Machine/ Grandpa Beagle's Day Out
programme.desc: Mickey challenges Professor Von Drake's Self-Racing Racer to a race and Billy Beagle asks the Happy Helpers to help his grandpa with some errands.

programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Giganto Power/ Crying Wolfasaurus
programme.desc: Rocky wants’ a powerful tail, and Bill discovers that "crying wolf" gets him out of his responsibilities.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Floating Stone/The Light In the Storm
programme.desc: Mazu and Rocky must work together to save Tiny and Bill from Terminonator. Bill and Marsh are separated from their friends in a storm and must face their fears to get home.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Roadsterettes! / Oh Happy Day!
programme.desc: Famous race car driver Pippa Powers visits Hot Dog Hills for a reunion with her old car club. The Happy Helpers must show Mr. McSnorter how to relax on vacation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Impossible Race/ The Happiest Helpers Cruise!
programme.desc: Cuckoo Loca enters her first Roadster event. Then, the happy helpers become cruise directors on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Ruled Out/ That's Life

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Truth or Cosmoquences/ Beach Bummed
programme.desc: Cosmo wants help impressing people at his reunion; Timmy wishes he were stronger.

programme.desc: Timmy leaves his favourite comic book by the tub; Timmy becomes a ball boy.

LEGO Jurassic World: Spit Take!

programme.desc: Big Hero 6 must continue to fight off a city overrun with monsters.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Wendy's dad and Pedro's mom are getting married and Mavis has promised Hotel Transylvania will throw them the best wedding ever.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drop the Needle/ Really Gross Anatomy
programme.desc: Mavis agrees to teach Klaus to bat out if he shows her how to replace the needle on Aunt Lydia's gramophone. Dr. Gillman gets an education on medicine from Mavis and the crew, though no one really has much knowledge on the subject.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Steamer's Revenge
programme.desc: To try to prove Yama is behind a mysterious crime spree, perpetrated by tiny bots, Hiro is drawn back into the illegal world of bot-fighting.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Beginner's Luck
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: The Return of the Parker
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Turbo Match! Valtryek vs Lúinor!
programme.desc: Lui Shirosagi arrives in Japan to challenge Valt to a title match. Naturally, Aiger can’t resist the chance to challenge Lui for himself.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Final Rivals!
programme.desc: It’s time for the Alola Pokémon League finals, and the competitors are more determined than ever to become Champion!

programme.title: The List: Signature Moves
programme.desc: Some of the most unstoppable moves in NBA history, from the skyhook, to the dream shake and even the step-back, NBA TV deep-dives into the NBA's individual creativity.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic

programme.title: The Making of: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.desc: True to his promise, the dark wizard Grindelwald escapes from custody while being transferred to Europe to answer for his crimes, and begins assembling followers who share his ambitions, but he's opposed by a young wizard with a love of magical beasts.

programme.title: Movie: A Star Is Born

programme.title: Movie: The Recruit
programme.desc: A mentor asks a talented young CIA trainee to help find a mole inside the agency.

programme.title: Movie: The Sun is Also a Star
programme.desc: In New York, two young students fall in love, as one of them faces deportation alongside her family.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: After the queen bee of a college sorority is murdered on her birthday, she wakes up again that same morning and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. Determined to break the cycle, she tries to figure out who keeps killing her.

programme.title: Movie: Unfriended: Dark Web
programme.desc: A young man brings home a laptop abandoned in a lost-and-found bin, and in a secret file on it he discovers disturbing videos. After sharing them with his friends in an attempt to determine whether or not they're real, they find themselves targeted.

programme.title: Real Sports With Bryant Gumbel
programme.desc: Goes beyond the scores and statistics to present a critical look at the world of sports.

programme.title: Movie: Green Lantern
programme.desc: When a test pilot is given a magical ring, he inherits supernatural powers. With this ring comes the responsibility to become part of an interspatial battalion that is charged with creating peace among the universe.

programme.title: Movie: Brothers
programme.desc: A young man comforts his sister-in-law and nieces after the military informs them that his older brother is missing in action.

programme.title: Movie: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampett family strikes oil in the Ozark swamps, they move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Movie: The 33
programme.desc: Based on the true story of 33 Chilean miners who are trapped underground for 69 days. When a cave-in traps them beneath 2,000 feet of rock, the miners fight to survive the suffocating heat, and dwindling food and water supplies.

programme.title: Movie: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: When a young girl is institutionalized by her abusive stepfather, she retreats into a fantasy world with the other girls and dreams of escaping her captors in order to cope.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day 2U
programme.desc: Two years after she was forced to relive the day of her murder over and over again, a young woman finds herself caught in another deadly time loop, only this time her friends are caught in it too, forcing her to unmask the killer to break the cycle.

programme.title: Movie: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
