programme.title: Movie: Aquaman
programme.desc: A man learns that he is the half-human, half-Atlantean heir to an undersea kingdom that is ruled by his half-brother who plans to wage a devastating war on the surface world, forcing him to become a leader and challenge his brother for the throne.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: After Letty is killed, Dom returns to America in search of her killer. Brian is an FBI agent who is on the same trail as Dom, which leads to a drug ring and Letty's killer. Infiltrating the driver ranks, Dom and Brian try to get to the bottom things.

programme.title: Movie: Wet Hot American Summer

programme.title: Shameless: Now Leaving Illinois

programme.title: Movie: Five Feet Apart
programme.desc: Teenagers suffering from cystic fibrosis fall for one another at a hospital.

programme.title: The L Word: Generation Q: Loose Ends

programme.title: Work In Progress: 15, 14 (pt. 1)
programme.desc: Edward and Carol Lynn wed. Danger Zone has their moment and Abby violates Chris' one request.

programme.title: Movie: Shaft
programme.desc: A detective must track down the only eyewitness who can put away all of his enemies.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious

programme.title: Movie: At Eternity's Gate

programme.title: Movie: Spotlight
programme.desc: The Boston Globe's 'Spotlight' team delves into allegations of sexual abuse perpetrated by Catholic priests in their own city.

programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the team searches for an underground group of hackers co-founded by Pride's old contact, Elvis Bertrand. Also, Sebastian joins the team as a newly minted NCIS Special Agent.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to partner with Pride and his team in the search for a missing homeland security theoretical terror playbook.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: Wade's son Danny calls Pride for help after he's attacked at his girlfriend's house and she goes missing. Also, the director of NCIS mandates that Pride meet with a therapist to discuss his process for solving cases.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Hard Knock Life
programme.desc: Pride second-guesses evidence suggesting homeless kids are the suspects in the murder of a petty officer.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Mirror, Mirror
programme.desc: After Rita Deveraux tells Pride that Douglas Hamilton is about to make a deal to get out of prison, Pride and the team rehash the Clearwater case in hopes of locating his mystery partner and spoiling his bargaining chip.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Monster
programme.desc: After a deadly armed robbery and high-speed chase is connected to an undercover ATF operation, Percy reconnects with her former ATF partner, Jake Roman.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy
programme.desc: Adventurers inadvertently resurrect a malevolent force with unspeakable power.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: A 3,000-year-old mummy is resurrected and resumes its evil quest for immortality.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick and Evelyn return to save the world after their son accidentally resurrects an evil Chinese emperor.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Stand
programme.desc: After escaping from a courthouse, the leader of a drug cartel heads to Mexico.

programme.title: Movie: Taken
programme.desc: Agent Bryan Mills left the service to be closer to his daughter Kim. When she goes on a tour of France, she is kidnapped by human traffickers and Bryan does everything in his power to get her back.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Movie: Focus
programme.desc: A seasoned grifter takes a beautiful, rookie con artist under his wing and a romantic attachment develops. He breaks things off but their paths cross three years later when his protégé, now a skilled femme fatale, throws a wrench in his latest scheme.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Awakening
programme.desc: Humans wage war against Vampire and Lycan clans after learning of their existence.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: The story comes to a close as Katniss and the unit from District 13 prepare to take down President Snow once and for all. With the nation in a full-scale war, Katniss will be tested as never before as she fights for the very future of Panem.

programme.desc: A Western movie star is forced to spend a weekend doing PR at a dude ranch. When his fans learn he's terrified of horses, he sets out to prove to them that he really does have what it takes to be a rancher.

programme.title: Movie: Love, of Course

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: This documentary features interviews with Carlina White who tells her own story, as well as her birth parents and the family of her kidnapper as they offer their own perspectives about the case.

programme.title: Movie: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A newborn is abducted from a New York hospital and eventually solves her own case and is reunited with her biological parents 23 years later.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Somebody's Child: The Regina Louise Story
programme.desc: After a young African American girl grows up in foster homes, she believes her luck will change with a chance adoption from a woman who believes in her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: A shooting at the University of Alabama Huntsville leaves three professors dead and the community questioning how they missed a murderer in their midst.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Zombie Apocalypse
programme.desc: The recent wave of crazed and bloody cannibalistic attacks have made headlines and forced many to start believing the unbelievable.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Crystal Skull Obsession
programme.desc: Josh investigates the iconic mystery of the crystal skulls. He visits sites in Belize, Spain and Scotland where the legends are born from obsession.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Ledge Fishing on Famous Pickwick Lake, Florence, Alabama
programme.desc: Johnathan Newton and Scott target schools of bass on the ledges of Pickwick Lake in Florence, Alabama.

programme.title: The Experience: Rodney Atkins Country Music Artist Matt Murman - Hero Part 2
programme.desc: The Experience continues as Matt Murman begins his hunt in Colorado at the Motherwell Ranch.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Places of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores three iconic monuments, including the majestic Statue of Liberty and one of the world's greatest architectural masterpieces: the Blue Mosque.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Backcountry Snookin'
programme.desc: Blair fishes for monster snook in the Florida Everglades with Capt. Kevin Mihailoff.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Power Fishing Heavy Snap Jigs for Shallow Water Walleye
programme.desc: Freshwater Hall of Fame inductee Gary Parsons and tournament champion John Hoyer power fish for shallow water walleye.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: The Captain
programme.desc: John Jackson and crew head to Venice, Louisiana with Capt. Brent Roy.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Puzzle Plans
programme.desc: Justin and DOA pro Ed Zyak test new lures in Panama City Beach. Travis visits an escape room.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Flukes Allowed
programme.desc: The racers move into round two in St. Louis and newcomer Big Chief is making big moves to show he's a force to be reckoned with. Team NOLA continues to make its presence felt, proving they shouldn't be overlooked.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Outcast Mentality
programme.desc: With three drivers in the top five, NOLA shows no signs of slowing down as racers head into round two in Idaho. Meanwhile, teamwork doesn't come naturally to the newly-formed Team Outcast.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Game On
programme.desc: Team NOLA is seeking revenge as the racers move into the second round at Route 66 Raceway. Ryan is ready to fight to keep his points lead but Disco Dean, Axman and the Outcasts are hot on his trail.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Ruler of the Mountain
programme.desc: Conditions remain unforgiving as the racers move into round two at Colorado's Bandimere Speedway. With so much on the line, even those who are struggling will stop at nothing to win and be crowned King or Queen of the Mountain.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Callout Karma
programme.desc: Round two hits the racers at a time when every decision can either make or break them. Points leader Ryan Martin becomes painfully aware of the consequences of his decisions when it matters most.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: It Ain't Over Yet
programme.desc: Round two of the seventh race begins. Team NOLA's strategy in round one didn't pan out, but they still have a chance to impact the points standings if leaders draw one of their names.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Do or Die
programme.desc: The second round of the season's final race has arrived and all eyes are on Ryan as he attempts bring home the championship after two unsuccessful seasons. Kye and Lizzy are his only competition but they're laser-focused on taking the win for themselves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Surprise, Surprise!
programme.desc: Tumi lost 175 lbs. and has a special guest waiting for her: Jillian Michaels. Megan leaves the salon for a surprise proposal and a trip.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Chart Topping Dress
programme.desc: Country star Whitney Duncan needs a dress that, like her, commands centre stage. Rock girl Chic wants a gown that is hot, sexy and beautiful. Songwriter Kiirsten is nervous for her fitting, but should be more worried about her veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'I'm a Firm Believer in Signs'
programme.desc: Bride Jenna is joined by her NFL player brother, Justin Pugh, who feels he's well-versed in fashion. Also, Talmesha wants a gown that will compliment a very special bouquet honoring her late father.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Choose Me
programme.desc: Mursel packs his bags for Turkey. Angela arrives in Nigeria. Natalie's reveal leaves Mike devastated. Juliana bonds with Michael's ex. Tania and Syngin's romantic reunion goes south. Blake's friends confront him about Jasmin.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Supersized: Adventures in Pimplepopping
programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Footnotes: Mo Toes, Mo Problems
programme.desc: A man with an enormous lump on his foot creates a mystery for Dr. Vincent. Dr. Schaeffer faces a case of a wart cluster that is all over a man's foot and patient Kiara has the first double big toe the doctor has ever come face-to-face with.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Bethany's Story
programme.desc: Bethany has two daughters who live in fear of losing their mom to her food addiction. Once an addiction counselor, Bethany has gotten so big than she can no longer work. Now she risks losing her life, if Dr. Now can't help curb her addiction.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Supersized: Adventures in Pimplepopping
programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Footnotes: Mo Toes, Mo Problems
programme.desc: A man with an enormous lump on his foot creates a mystery for Dr. Vincent. Dr. Schaeffer faces a case of a wart cluster that is all over a man's foot and patient Kiara has the first double big toe the doctor has ever come face-to-face with.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Bethany's Story
programme.desc: Bethany has two daughters who live in fear of losing their mom to her food addiction. Once an addiction counselor, Bethany has gotten so big than she can no longer work. Now she risks losing her life, if Dr. Now can't help curb her addiction.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Mariah's Big Announcement
programme.desc: Christine and Meri try to recover the fun relationship they had years ago. Kody and Christine go to check out Flagstaff, AZ. Mariah has something big to announce to the family. Meanwhile Janelle talks to her kids about the move.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: A young woman is rushed to the ER after being bitten in the face by a dog, an ER doctor has to overcome his fears when he's confronted with an unusual series of patients and an intoxicated woman injured in a fall unexpectedly goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Diagnose Me!/ In and out of Flatline/ Like a Virgin
programme.desc: A teen is bleeding internally from an ectopic pregnancy, but denies ever having sex, so her doctor must find a clever way to treat her. A young mother mysteriously goes in and out of flatline. A patient is healthy, but refuses to leave the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Stuck in a Toilet
programme.desc: A woman is stuck in a toilet bowl for over 18 hours, and the medical team can't free her. A man's leg is mangled by a stump grinder, but that's the least of his troubles.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Drama Mama
programme.desc: The real reason behind a teenager's bulging tummy and stomach pains shocks nurses, doctors and even her meddling mom. A delirious man yelling for his 'car' reveals clues about his own attempted murder, and a college co-ed mysteriously stops breathing.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: A newlywed's hand gets stuck in a kitchen appliance. A college student is tormented by an injury down under. A heavy drinker is now sober and experiencing life-threatening complications. A woman appears to only have blood flow to half of her brain.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deadly Sore Throat
programme.desc: A wheezing woman comes to the ER with a difficult-to-diagnose problem and a very angry husband; a grown man suddenly begins acting like a child; a birthday party goes bad as the whole family comes to the ER deathly ill.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Delusional Bride/ Talk to Me!/ Front Seat Baby
programme.desc: A pregnant woman delivers in the front seat of her car and a bride stops her wedding because she feels possessed by creatures crawling in her head. Later, a physician yells at her comatose heart attack patient, trying to get him to fight for his own life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Was Expecting
programme.desc: Emily, a rock star by night, wants to shake her all-black attire for a traditional gown. Brittany has bright red hair and tattoos and wants to show them off in a sexy lace gown. Lauren is nervous that her friends will think her dress is too unusual.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Than a Wedding
programme.desc: Cheryl has recently beaten breast cancer and had her last reconstructive surgery a week ago. Jennifer is battling a rare kidney disease, and Kristin is overcoming stage four lung cancer. For these brides, their weddings are a celebration of love and life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Breaking the Bank
programme.desc: Alexis has searched everywhere for a certain gown, only to now find it's double her budget. Jenna's dream dress turns into a nightmare when it's $7,000 over budget. Lauren is committed to going over budget on her see-through bodice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Brittany, who was always the bridesmaid but now the bride, wants to 'drop it low' in a dress. Veronica is determined to make her second wedding perfect. Erika bought her dress four years ago and is now ready to walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Francesca returns for a second visit, but her picky entourage may not let her choose the dress she loves. Brittany wants a non-traditional gown, but her mom is not on board. Samantha gets fitted for her reception dress, but the top is completely sheer.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Vision Confusion
programme.desc: Lauren wants to look like a 'classy porn star' at her wedding, but she's in for a surprise. Bride Cheryl only knows what she does not want her wedding dress to look like. Bride Amanda hopes her custom gown lives up to the vision in her mind.

programme.title: Movie: Superbad
programme.desc: Two nerdy high school seniors attend a party in hopes of losing their virginity before going off to different colleges.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.desc: Ali Siddiq headlines, and is followed by Giulia Rozzi's jokes about dating a personal trainer. Plus, Tacarra Williams deals with her daughter's school bully.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 5
programme.desc: A party entertainer's entire act is squeezing into tiny shirts, a news reporter wanders into a hip-deep puddle in the middle of a story, and a motivational speaker keeps trying - and failing - to break a board over his head.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 6
programme.desc: A wedding DJ plays the bongos on his young assistant's breasts, teenage boys post a video on the web showcasing their furniture humping ability, and a synchronized dance competition is marred by a wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Holy Moly Mirror

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Soliciting Statue
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 11

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gettin' Fresh
programme.desc: In Boulder, Colo., a college town favourite since the 1920s is flipping grass-fed beef burgers. And, in Chicago, a family-run restaurant puts a twist on biscuits and gravy - with free-range duck.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From the Heart
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some spots putting their heart and soul into everything they do. In Carlsbad, Calif., a family-owned Italian joint is staying true to a long-standing ravioli recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Knockouts
programme.desc: Guy's traveling up and down the west coast in search of funky neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: To Bakersfield and Beyond
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's giving some love to a little town with a lot of flavor. In Bakersfield, Calif., the landmark Basque spot serving a four-course meal including outrageous oxtail and garlic fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Brisket to Bison
programme.desc: It's all about the meat as Guy Fieri crosses the country to stop at some of his favorite haunts. In Denver, a Native American eatery has a new way to serve bison, and a Nashville diner is taking lamb to the next level. Plus, Guy snoops around Yellowstone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Bites And Southern Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing some barbecue and Southern comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Intrigue
programme.desc: Guy grabs some Thai noodles, curry and green papaya salad in Dallas. In Miami he visits a Lating place for empanadas and a unique plantain sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern to South American
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into Southern comfort food and South American specialties. In Atlanta, a real-deal soul food spot dishing out collard green lasagna and a twist on fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat And Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried and Smoked
programme.desc: Sometimes it's not what you're cooking but how you're cooking it. Outside San Antonio, Guy Fieri checks in on the O.G. Triple D, and she's blowin' his mind with her new fried food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Passport of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into killer cuisine with international flair. In Lansing he checks out a Middle Eastern joint that puts out serious shawarma and gangster grape leaves. Plus, a Vietnamese spot is serving real-deal spring rolls and brisket.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: The Kitchen: Dining On A Dime
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are sharing tips for money-saving meals and dollar-stretching deals, starting with Sunny Anderson's meat n' potatoes bundt loaf. Then they'll break down your shopping cart and determine the best place to buy common grocery items.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: The Big Chill
programme.desc: Truffle mac and cheese; fresh lemon mousse; cinnamon honey butter.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Potluck Party
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a casual but chic Potluck Party and asks each guest to bring their grandmother's favorite recipe to share with the group. Giada's own recipes include an American punch, red rice salad, and a sweet and crunchy broccoli salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Lunch With Aunt T
programme.desc: When Trisha Yearwood's niece Ashley first moved to Nashville, she would text Aunt T for recipe ideas and ways to make meals that last on a college student's budget. They're demonstrating these recipes and showing incredible ways to meal prep for the week.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Takeout at Home
programme.desc: The divine combination of flavours in Rachael Ray's crazy Szechuan beef and messy corn with Shishido packs a punch with every bite. The secret to this takeout favorite is the ground Szechuan peppercorns blended with turmeric and sweet rice wine vinegar.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Price Crunch Challenge
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts compete to make the most-affordable meal that doesn't skimp on flavour. Alex Guarnaschelli starts the competition with her meaty, cheesy stuffed peppers and Geoffrey Zakarian makes breakfast for dinner with a family-sized omelette.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Breaking Bread with Julie
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her longtime friend, Julie, into the kitchen for a day celebrating all things bread. As they swap childhood bread-making stories, they create a tasty menu.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feed a Firefighter
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood loves to support her local community, so she stops by the local firehouse to visit her buddy, Gary, and see if he and the other firefighters would enjoy a comforting meal.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: 1, 2, 3 Delicious!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the 11 young bakers to create assigned Neapolitan desserts featuring chocolate, strawberry and vanilla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Best of Breakfast

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Guy checks out the country for an incredible variety of chicken dishes and somehow every new plate offers a twist on the traditional bird. From garlic chicken to stuffed Native American-style tacos and barbeque wings, Guy finds the chicken.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Our Blue Planet
programme.desc: Explore parts of the ocean that have never been visited, encounter extraordinary animals and discover insights into life beneath the waves. Sir David Attenborough then examines the impact of human activity.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Blue Planet Now: Whale Sanctuary

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Blue Planet Now: Shark Paradise

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Blue Planet Now: Wonders of the Reef

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Blue Planet Now: Hammerheads and Humpbacks

programme.title: Planet Earth: One Amazing Day

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Painted Wolf

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Lions

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Quest for Camel-ot
programme.desc: It’s an emotional time for the Pol family as they bid farewell to their beloved cat, Kid.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Doomsday at Dragon's Teeth
programme.desc: Eerie ghost ships stranded in an alien desert, sinister ruins known as the Dragon's Teeth, and a ghostly complex with a bloody past are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Doomsday at Dragon's Teeth

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: When an oil rig in Louisiana drills into something unexpected, a cataclysmic event is unleashed, causing a lake to suddenly disappear; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: The Informant
programme.desc: An inmate risks his life and turns informant to help Sergeant Hampton and Special Agent John Fisher eliminate the inmates' outside drug source.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Justin/ Frank

programme.desc: Earl Forrest burst into a friend's house and gunned down two people in cold blood. He then ambushed the deputies who came knocking, leaving four more people shot. Forrest reveals the surprising reason behind the killing spree.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Twisted Love: Dena Riley

programme.desc: A likeable and hard working father is found murdered and questions are raised about his family.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deceitful Secrets
programme.desc: Cecil and Larlane Brown have been together for years. But their secrets and lies, ignored and neglected for decades, threaten to turn their 50-year relationship into a bloody battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bored to Death

programme.title: Possessed by Murder
programme.desc: Religion and violence collide in small town Oregon when a cold-blooded murder occurs in a devout prayer group. When the crime is tied to a second homicide across the state, police uncover the bizarre truth that tears apart not one, but two families.

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: Casey Anthony insists that her 2-year-old daughter Caylee was abducted by the nanny, but investigators soon discover the child has been missing for 31 days. Where is Caylee?

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: A Shallow Grave
programme.desc: As the Casey Anthony trial begins, the defense unleashes shocking allegations and the prosecution reveals their theory of how Caylee died.

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: Ten Hours, 40 Minutes
programme.desc: As the Casey Anthony trial continues, the defense takes centre stage and the verdict sparks outrage across the country.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Lust for Murder
programme.desc: When Stacie Smith is found dead and an accusation that she has been unfaithful is written on the wall of the crime scene, police believe that a jealous lover is behind her brutal death. But that might just be a ploy to frame the wrong man for the crime.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Gambling With The Devil
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her car by her husband and son.

programme.title: Before I Die: In the line of Duty
programme.desc: January 28, 1986, Deputy Floyd Moore is locking up. He sees a man acting suspiciously. Floyd calls for back-up, which arrives moments too late as Floyd is shot in the head. The man's ID is found hidden in Floyd's pocket and the hunt is on.

programme.title: Before I Die: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: On June 23, 2008, Sharon Denson is found shot seven times and severely burnt. Her courage and strength in escaping the building and giving a dying declaration while she still could, ultimately lead to her murderer being caught and convicted.

programme.title: Before I Die: Amber Alert
programme.desc: On March 14, 2017, Amanda Mangas is found with a single gunshot wound to her chest. She tells police that her baby son, Winston, has been kidnapped before dying from her wounds. This leads to a tri-state Amber Alert in the hunt to save Winston.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Evil in Idaho
programme.desc: Lisa Stukey lives in the small, picturesque community of Idaho Falls, Idaho. After she's not heard from for weeks, her decomposing body is found inside her home. When police finally catch the culprit, the killer has shocking ties to the victim.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Evil Twins: All-American Killers
programme.desc: Identical twins Roman and Ruslan Glukhoy are high school wrestling champions with a bright future in professional sports. But when a freak accident shatters their dreams, they follow a path to death and destruction with blood on their hands.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fire for Freedom
programme.desc: Identical twins Caleb and Joshua are the apples of their father's eye, but the pressure to be exceptional manifests into dangerous hatred. Isolated from the world, their seclusion fuels a need to break free at any cost.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mother of Evil
programme.desc: For identical twins Mark and Martin Stephens, life in a family of twins has been anything but normal. But one of them is more unusual than the others. And before long, someone close will learn just how deadly a lifetime of unrealized dreams can be.

programme.title: See No Evil: Someone to Watch Over Her
programme.desc: On a freezing winter night, a hardworking mother doesn't make it home from work. As dawn breaks, her body is found in a churchyard. With the city in panic, Police turn to the city's surveillance cameras... hoping they can help catch a brutal murderer.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: Lester M. Gills began his crime career at an early age in a street gang in the Chicago slums.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: Lester M. Gills began his crime career at an early age in a street gang in the Chicago slums.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Honey Bucket
programme.desc: Nick races to finish his cabin before his mom visits again. Bears are still a threat, so Nick makes sure the electric fence is working. Nick and Kent design and build a "honey bucket," also known as an Alaskan toilet.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Nick's dad, Paul, returns to help put the finishing touches on the cabin. Brannon's team builds countertops and railings for the cabin, and his client arrives. Jere and Ben put in hard work finishing the new Sea Otter Sound Lodge.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.desc: Jon and Kristen work to build a container home for the in-laws when they come to visit their new grandson. With only four weeks to complete the project, the couple must must tackle 20-foot and 40-foot containers.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Nicole is back in action and juggling two Detroit houses at the same time. While the Ferndale house is in great shape, the 14 Mile property is gutted of its original fixtures and charm. Ferndale serves as the inspiration for renovations at 14 Mile.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Nicole tackles a 1920s house that used to be a rental and has incredibly small upstairs bedrooms. She plans to change the layout and add character, including removing a wall to make room for a new hallway and custom linen closet.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Matching Game
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fighting the Elements to Build a Well House, and Repairing a Damaged Log Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to their roots in Asheville, North Carolina. They have one day to build a log well house in the driving rain. Once it's up, they have to repair a severely damaged log home nearby.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Pristine Hand-Hewn Logs from a West Virginia Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to the heart of West Virginia, to salvage incredibly rare 170-year-old logs from a perfectly preserved log home. The pressure is on to keep these logs pristine as they take them down.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding the 100% Cabin and Restoring a Legacy
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the 100% cabin to South Carolina where they rebuild it as a hunting cabin. While they are there, they work with the client's kids to build a camping cabin out of their ancestor's log home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Cabin Dream Come True
programme.desc: Tammy Harrah and her late husband dreamed of running a craft store in a log cabin on their West Virginia family homestead. The guys make this dream come true for her and her son building a cabin for them and making some homemade crafts for the store.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: South Beach Wine and Food Festival
programme.desc: Four bakers are returning for redemption and a chance to serve their winning cupcakes alongside world-renowned chefs.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Rock and Roll Cupcakes
programme.desc: Bakers compete for a showcase at a party celebrating the I Heart Radio music festival.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Harlem Globetrotters
programme.desc: Four cupcake makers are going to have to pull out all their baking tricks if they want to win the chance to have their cupcakes center court at a huge fan event for the world famous Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Five: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.desc: Popular radio personalities Marty and McGee meet at the crossroads of southern culture and college football.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Colonization Application

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Leftover Thermalization

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory: The Fortification Implementation
programme.desc: When Sheldon and Amy build a blanket fort, they come to major crossroads in their relationship. Wolowitz meets the half-brother he never knew he had. When Penny is invited to appear on Wil Wheaton's podcast, she and Leonard have a huge, on-air argument.

programme.title: Full Frontal With Samantha Bee: January 15, 2020

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Dumpster Sex

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: When Deke invites Max's friends over for a gathering at his dumpster, Caroline learns an enormous secret about his background.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the ATM

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Favor

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Safe House

programme.desc: After stealing a dollar from his girlfriend's child, a minor league hockey player is ordered to fill the role of the Tooth Fairy. While bumbling through the process, he rediscovers his childhood dreams and learns how to follow his heart.

programme.title: Movie: The Pacifier
programme.desc: Assigned to protect the children of an assassinated scientist, Shane Wolf is suddenly faced with two incompatible jobs: fighting evil while keeping house and protecting a family from enemies seeking a top-secret experiment.

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: The Anti-Villain League has recruited Gru to help deal with a powerful new super criminal.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick and Evelyn return to save the world after their son accidentally resurrects an evil Chinese emperor.

programme.title: Movie: The Legend of Tarzan
programme.desc: Many years after Tarzan left the jungles of Africa to live in London with his wife Jane, he is invited back as a trade emissary to the Congo. He is unaware that he is just a pawn in a deadly convergence of greed, putting both his lives in danger.

programme.title: Movie: San Andreas
programme.desc: When an earthquake rips open California, an LAPD search-and-rescue helicopter pilot and his ex-wife attempt to save their only daughter who's trapped in San Francisco. Though the worst of the devastation appears to be over, it's only getting started.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: A 3,000-year-old mummy is resurrected and resumes its evil quest for immortality.

programme.title: Movie: Into the Storm
programme.desc: In just one day, a town is torn apart by multiple cyclones -- and the worst is yet to come. A group of storm chasers gets as close to the funnels as possible to document and experience first-hand the most severe weather conditions nature has to offer.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: Sebastian receives a plea for help from his high school friend after her business partner is killed at the Crescent City Gaming Convention. Also, a FBI special agent believes Adrian is a hacker the Cyber Crimes division has been tracking for years.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A petty officer's murder leads the team to a family-owned night club where Pride's mother used to perform weekly. Also, Lasalle must urgently return home to Alabama after receiving an unexpected call from his family.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: A New Dawn
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer who was in town to help a refugee family being recruited by terrorists. Also, Wade works on the special election campaign for Mayor Zahra Taylor that takes place during Mardi Gras.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Mile
programme.desc: FBI Special Agent Raymond Isler asks Pride for help with an off-the-books opioids theft investigation he is personally invested in. Also, Percy is sent undercover as a getaway driver with Isler as the muscle for a job tied to the case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Empathy
programme.desc: NCIS investigates the disappearance of a congressional aide after a hitman saves her from two men posing as NCIS agents. Also, Lasalle struggles with life-altering decisions regarding his brother's future.

programme.title: Movie: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: A young woman named Belle longs to leave her tiny village. When she discovers her father is missing, she finds him as a prisoner of a Beast. She takes his place and lives at the castle, drawing closer to Beast but unaware of the approaching danger.

programme.title: Movie: Cinderella
programme.desc: A kind-hearted young woman is treated with cruelty and disdain by her stepmother and stepsisters. She's forbidden to attend an open ball at the castle, but a kindly beggar woman steps in with a pumpkin, some mice and a little magic.

programme.title: Movie: Maleficent
programme.desc: An act of betrayal turns a fairy's heart to stone and leads her to curse her enemy's newborn daughter, the princess. It becomes apparent as the child grows, however, that she may in fact be the key to restoring peace to the land.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Movie: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Captain Richard Phillips and his crew had their ship hijacked by Somali pirates in 2009. Witness the story of the first American cargo ship hijacking in 200 years.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
