programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
programme.desc: Rookie police officer James Duckett is sentenced to death for the rape and murder of a young girl. Fourteen years later, a homicide detective gets a letter from Duckett and becomes convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Miami
programme.desc: In 1987 Kris Maharaj, a wealthy British businessman, is sentenced to death for a double homicide in a luxury Miami hotel. The case seems open and shut until an attorney uncovers powerful evidence supporting an alternative explanation of the killings.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Innocence and the Intern
programme.desc: An elderly white widow is brutally murdered in Greenwood, S.C., and Edward Lee Elmore, an African American handyman, is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death. A tenacious legal intern comes across the case and tries to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line

programme.desc: Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary. When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Ballad of Billy Brown
programme.desc: In honor of Billy's birthday, the family sets up a series of surprises and celebrations. A visit from old childhood friends inspires Billy, Ami and the rest of the wolf pack to reflect back on a lifetime of stories and adventures in the wild.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Bart's First Defeat
programme.desc: A fire captain who witnessed his best friend attacked by a grizzly returns to face his greatest fear. A champion bull rider discovers his threshold for pain against an apex predator and a Polynesian fire dancer stuns Bart with his first ever defeat.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: New Evidence
programme.desc: Researchers turn to science to test theories that methane bubbles, rogue waves or lightning could be responsible for the mysteries surrounding the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Cults of Personality
programme.desc: Josh explores three locations where people connect with spirits and miracles, from a celebration honoring a mysterious American soldier on a remote Pacific island to portal to the dead in New Orleans.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Sailfishing in Guatemala
programme.desc: Jimmy is joined by friends and Captain Brad Phillips in the sailfish capitol of the world, Guatemala.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Army - Rebekkah Camp and Jason Martin
programme.desc: Two veterans help each other cope through their military struggles and PTSD.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: A Little Help from My Friends
programme.desc: Lain and George fish in the Everglades with radio host Matt Bellinger, and learn about Dolphin's Plus Marine Mammal Rescue.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Green Turtle Cay, Bahamas, Bottom Fish Bonanza!
programme.desc: George Poveromo and Carl Grassi visit the Green Turtle Club Resort and Marina.

programme.title: Silver Kings: Shake 'n' Bake
programme.desc: Tarpon angler Baker Bishop joins Jared in Islamorada.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Backcountry Passages of Key Largo
programme.desc: Rick and Ridge pursue snook and redfish in Key Largo.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stalked on All Sides
programme.desc: Pinned down by Africa's most dangerous threats, elephants, hippos and lions, Kel and Eric work together to avoid becoming prey, but a debilitating injury puts them both at risk. Then, survivalists struggle against threats both natural and supernatural.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dunes of Despair
programme.desc: A laid back wilderness instructor and his go-getter 'wild child' survival mate are dropped onto the sun-scorched, desolate sand dunes of Brazil. In this bleak landscape of blinding white sand, they battle hunger, dehydration and, ultimately, each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Unhinged
programme.desc: An ex-marine and a perky Southern girl attempt to survive three weeks in the Panamanian Jungle. Constant downpours, cabin fever, threats from predators, lack of sleep and extreme hunger soon take its toll on one of them.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: Instant attraction gives way to unforgiving conditions on a Nicaraguan island teeming with bull sharks and big cats. As the struggle to survive hits a low point; a brutal flood threatens to wipe out the camp and all chances of survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Nicaragua Nightmare
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to survive for 21 days in the hot and swampy jungles of southern Nicaragua armed with only a machete and a roll of duct tape. But an early tap out leaves one of them left to survive alone for 16 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A biology student and an expert survival instructor team up on the swampy shore of Croatia. A strong partnership is forged through braving the elements and facing their demons, but takes a turn for the worst with a freak accident.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Booby Trap
programme.desc: Danielle's size 34, J-cup chest is blowing her budget sky high. Stephanie wants to show off the goods, but her mother certainly does not. Christie purchased a dress to flaunt her bust, but after losing weight, she hopes it still does.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'Please Love My Dress'
programme.desc: Eccentric Marlene wants a feathered or black ball gown, but her parents prefer something traditional. Jessica loves every dress she tries on, but her family likes none. Angelina is head-over-heels for a bohemian gown, but no one in her group is on board.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: HuffPost Live correspondent and host Caitlyn Becker is torn between the first two dresses she tries on. Candace declares the first gown she wears is her dream dress. Fitting bride Danielle hopes she still loves the first dress she tried on and bought.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Case of Dress Distress
programme.desc: Jamie is devastated when she falls in love with an over-budget gown her bossy bridesmaid picks out. Natalie has trouble committing to a dress in the absence of her ill mother. Fitting bride Nadia is nervous her reception gown will be the wrong colour.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Designer Dreams
programme.desc: Liz is in the salon with Danielle Jonas, and wants to show off her new body. Courtney Cason said yes to Mark Zunino's sketch, but now it's time to try on the real gown. Jillian wants a fashion forward dress but her mom isn't making it easy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Drama, Drama, Drama!
programme.desc: WyQuasia's family spends more time bickering with each other than listening to what the bride wants! Shelley's enormous entourage all have so many opinions they make dress shopping impossible. Bride Zabrina's mother demands her custom gown be redesigned.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Met My Fiance in Jail
programme.desc: With only nine weeks to go until America's wedding, Randy goes undercover to surprise a police officer and his bride-to-be.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Said Yes to the Dress, America!
programme.desc: Randy goes off the grid to surprise Sammi Jo and learns that she's anxious to go dress shopping without her mom. Raeshanda needs a dress fit for a queen for under $2000 or else it's off with their heads!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hell Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's a family affair as the sister of star NBA player Stephen Curry hunts for her dream wedding dress. Cami Lee is back with her over the top mom who will stop at nothing to make sure Cami doesn't get a black dress, including hunting Randy down for help.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Purple Unicorn
programme.desc: Bride Nik, rock star and former bass player for Prince, needs a one-of-a-kind dress for her aerial wedding ceremony. Teddi's wedding is only a few months away, see if this daddy's girls dress will be ready in time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Said Yes to the Dress, America!
programme.desc: Randy goes off the grid to surprise Sammi Jo and learns that she's anxious to go dress shopping without her mom. Raeshanda needs a dress fit for a queen for under $2000 or else it's off with their heads!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hell Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's a family affair as the sister of star NBA player Stephen Curry hunts for her dream wedding dress. Cami Lee is back with her over the top mom who will stop at nothing to make sure Cami doesn't get a black dress, including hunting Randy down for help.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Purple Unicorn
programme.desc: Bride Nik, rock star and former bass player for Prince, needs a one-of-a-kind dress for her aerial wedding ceremony. Teddi's wedding is only a few months away, see if this daddy's girls dress will be ready in time.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Texas Showdown
programme.desc: Four Texas friends who are about to become brides, put their friendship to the side and judge each other's weddings for the chance to win a surprise honeymoon in paradise.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: If You've Got it, Flaunt It
programme.desc: Kia is a pro-basketball player embracing her height, as she looks for the perfect long dress for her six-inch heels. Comedian Christie looks for a dress to show off what her mama gave her. Queen Precious has lost 100 pounds and hopes her dress still fits.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Dress like None the Rest
programme.desc: Broadway star Sutton Foster hunts for a dress to top all the other dresses she's worn. Wedding dress model Lauren fears she has worn too many gowns to find one that feels special. Hope is renewing her vows and this time she wants to wear her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dueling Visions
programme.desc: Kristin is torn between looking sexy or traditional. Alexa also wants a dress with sex appeal, but she needs to please her conservative dad. Diana can't decide between a flowy or structured gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Like Mother, Unlike Daughter
programme.desc: Valerie's budget is unlimited thanks to Dad, but Mom disagrees with her sexy dress choices. Bride Napiera wants a ball gown, but both her mother and former TV mom' think form fitting is best.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Afraid to Try New Things
programme.desc: Wedding planner Rachel is excited to try on dresses so edgy they might scare off other brides. Plus, Natalie also wants a unique gown, but she's worried about getting her traditional mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Your Day
programme.desc: War veteran and bride-to-be Alicia has served in both Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, it's Randy's turn to give back to her by surprising this shocked bride with a VIP day at Kleinfeld. The surprises keep getting bigger and better all day long.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Won the Battle Against My Twin!
programme.desc: Bride Margo struggles to get her twin sister's approval of the dresses she tries on. Brenda needs all four of her sisters to agree with her dress choice. Amy is trying on her super sexy gown, but worries her twin sister will think it's too revealing.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm a Legacy
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress, but is not sure if she is ready to walk down the aisle '80s style. Randy and Antonella know it's going to be a rough appointment when bride LeAnne declares she's the ultimate anti-bride!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Am a Bride on a Budget
programme.desc: Lauren has a $2,000 budget but is in love with a dress that will blow that budget to shreds. Shoshana is a struggling actress, paying for her own dress to complete her special day. Sara is way over budget and has to convince her father it's worth it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Oh My God! Welcome to My Home!
programme.desc: Randy officially kicks off his 'SAY YES AMERICA' tour. When he shows up at unsuspecting Katie's front door she gets the shock of her life. Bride Dana wants to flash her tats on the wedding day but her conservative entourage won't go down without a fight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Met My Fiance in Jail

programme.title: Sister Wives: Happier Alone?

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Rats

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Monica Sings
programme.desc: Monica sings at a karaoke bar and is very exposed; Rachel and Gavin kiss.

programme.title: Mom: Twinkle Lights and Grandma Shoes
programme.desc: Bonnie gets cold feet when considering her future with Adam and Christy risks failing an important test in order to help a fellow alcoholic.

programme.title: Mom: Fish Town and Too Many Thank You's
programme.desc: Bonnie is suspicious when her brother, Ray returns from rehab and strikes up a friendship with Adam. Christy and Bonnie have a brush with the law when they take Ray's car for a joy ride.

programme.title: Mom: A Seafaring Ancestor and a Bloomin' Onion
programme.desc: Christy discovers she and her younger classmate, Cooper make a good team both in and out of the classroom. Meanwhile, Bonnie steps up when a newly sober Natasha fears she can't handle motherhood.

programme.title: Mom: Fancy Crackers and Giant Women
programme.desc: Bonnie suffers withdrawal after giving up cable TV to help Christy pay for her law school applications. The women rally around Jill after she has a breakdown in her favourite department store.

programme.title: George Lopez: Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Still furious about her break up with Randy, Benny takes a golf club to her boss' car.

programme.title: George Lopez: What George Doesn't Noah

programme.title: George Lopez: Now George Noah's Ex-Zackly What Happened
programme.desc: George and Angie forbid Carmen and Zack's relationship, which may push Carmen away.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Searches for a Needle in a Haight-Stack
programme.desc: When Carmen leaves home after an argument, George and Angie's dad set out to look for her.

programme.title: George Lopez: Landlord Almighty
programme.desc: When Carmen grows tired of the house rules and remodels her room without her parents' consent, George grants her request for independence by charging her living expenses.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: A Fish Story

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: A Friend Indeed

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper

programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Blown Away!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squirrel Jelly/The String
programme.desc: SpongeBob pulls a string that never seems to end from Squidward's shit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Getaway/ Lost and Found

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubbletown/Girls’ Night Out

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Grill Is Gone/ the Night Patty
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back. SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: The Loud House: Yes Man/ Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters ask Lincoln to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. Lisa gets her report card and finds she failed social skills and must make a friend to get her grade up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
programme.desc: When the house is infested with termites, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others with Aunt Ruth.Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Challenging the Weather

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Only Getting Worse

programme.title: Hoarders: Ingrid
programme.desc: Home shopping junky, Ingrid, has let her hoarding take over her home. Unopened boxes fill rooms to the point that it is impossible to use almost the entire house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary and Mary Ann
programme.desc: Mary has overstuffed her home and consignment shop, spending over $200,000; Mary Ann's husband threatens divorce.

programme.title: Hoarders: Stacey/ Roi
programme.desc: Stacey has two days to get rid of the 47 dogs and cats that have taken over her house, or she may lose both her daughter and her home. Roi has been evicted from his home, as there are too many dangerous hazards there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Kevin/ Mary
programme.desc: Kevin has hoarded himself out of his Upper East Side Manhattan apartment and sleeps on a bench in front of the building. Mary has hoarded her home to capacity.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sandy and Len
programme.desc: Len lives in a home stuffed full of garbage bags where he keeps all his belongings. If he doesn't clean up, his family fears his house will kill him.

programme.title: America's Top Dog: The Fast and the Furriest
programme.desc: A third-generation police K9, and a civilian underdog built for speed are among the pooches who face off in a competition that comes right down to the wire.

programme.title: America's Top Dog: Raising the Woof
programme.desc: A veteran K9 nicknamed 'The Wonder Mutt' is challenged by a police dog with hundreds of narcotics arrests and a civilian trick dog who just might be the most talented tail-wagger in the whole field.

programme.title: Movie: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: Army medic Desmond Doss, despite believing that WWII is justified, refuses to carry a weapon into battle. After almost going to prison, he proves himself, evacuating wounded from the front lines. He risks his life to save as many soldiers as he can.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: G.I. Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers share some (mis)information on aviation, and put-pocketing turns patriotic. A double punishment goes up in flames, and Joey Fatone recaps the season.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe invade Orlando. The guys are out of line managing a ride at a theme park, get all wet on a river adventure, and man the (mis)information booth. Plus, tonight's loser goes from spider hero to barnyard zero.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Staten Island Holiday Spectacular
programme.desc: The guys celebrate with some unseasonable specials, followed by new toys you may not want under the tree. Then, gift wrapping goes awry, and the big loser has a close encounter with some hungry wild life.

programme.title: Movie: Cop Out
programme.desc: A veteran police officer intends to pay for his daughter's wedding by selling a rare baseball card, but it is stolen. With the help of his rookie partner, the officer tracks down the card and the thieves that took it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Losers Special
programme.desc: Dave Hill, Tone Bell, and Julian McCullough compete to finally earn a win or at least avoid the dreaded apology.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: That's My Wife
programme.desc: Amir K guesses the last book that Natasha Leggero read, Moshe Kasher does a mean striper impersonation, and Natasha reveals Moshe's favorite class in school.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Show Some Respect
programme.desc: Dave Hill confesses who he has on the brain, J.P. McDale tales a shot at Dave's career, and Ali Kolbert reveals her side hustle.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explores the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Harry is undaunted when he learns that great danger awaits him if he returns to Hogwarts. When he finally arrives at school, he finds a community in the grips of a mysterious and sinister terror that has literally 'petrified' some of its members.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: In 2012, Robert met his match in one of the owners of Woody’s, a steakhouse in Tupelo. With over half a million in debt, Robert forced the mother-daughter team to take a hard look in the mirror. He returns to see if the business is still going.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Help Is On the Way
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine is in Akron, Ohio to save Edgar's Restaurant. Fixing a restaurant in only two days is impossible enough but when Glenn, the restaurant's owner, is less than honest, it creates a whole new set of problems.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multicultural Cooking
programme.desc: Guy digs into traditions from many cultures, including tortillas, tacos, Jewish deli food, and Puerto-Rican specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: College-Town Champs
programme.desc: Guy visits Columbus, Ohio for pierogies and a barbeque truck and Boulder, Colorado for noodles and chicken from a Thai restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: International Affair
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is circling the globe starting in Salt Lake City where a Vietnamese sandwich shop has exploded with six locations around town. In San Antonio, Texas, a Greek chef is whipping up real-deal Mexican for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cultural Twist
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine with a twist! First, there's a cafe that's been serving scratch-made Scandinavian specialties in Salt Lake City since the 1950s. Next, there's a pizza joint putting an Indian spin on the classic Italian pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy dives into all kinds of comfort cooking. In Phoenix a funky joint stacks up barbecue fries and a new spin on chilaquiles. In Boulder a pizza place loads up the pies with their meatball grinder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Name That Kitchen
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out some righteous spots that say a lot in the name. In Fort Collins, Colo., an NFL pro and Triple-D alum team up on gangster green chili and mile-high burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cosmopolitan Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing all kinds of cosmopolitan comfort food. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, a righteous joint puts a New England spin on corned beef and cabbage, plus a fresh take on stroganoff.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Make-Ahead Breakfast
programme.desc: Ina prepares a breakfast that includes raspberry baked French toast and mini Italian frittatas.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Money-Saving Showstoppers
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is serving a brunch that's easy on the wallet but full of flavour. His straight-from-the-pantry menu features an Italian egg bread bowl, a spinach salad with everything bagel croutons and a lemon caper dill vinaigrette.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri believes you don't need to break the bank to make delicious food, so he's invited his chef friends to the ranch to cook a frugal meal that's full of flavor. Aarti Sequeira makes a budget-friendly rice and lentil dish called Kichidi.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Lazy Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: Valerie and her husband create a lazy Sunday meal that allows them to use up food in their fridge in order to save time and money. The menu includes pot roast with veggies, green beans with shallots, stuffed mushrooms, and apricot clafouti.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chicken in Bulk
programme.desc: Ree's hitting the marked on a major bulk buy trip and stocking up on chicken breasts, ready to turn into a fantastic cobb salad, a pan of skillet chicken lasagna, cool crisp Thai lettuce wraps and feel-good chicken rice soup.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Simple Meals
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes five ingredient dishes, like chicken fennel bake, Spanish baked salmon, Teriyaki pork, spaghetti carbonara, and eggs in tomatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Other Cuts Of Beef
programme.desc: Ree's transforming random cuts of beef into four delicious dishes. She's turning stew beef into slow cooker Sunday stew and serving it with fabulous buttery parsley lemon noodles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is reclaiming kitchen scraps and transforming them into star dishes. Peels, stems and bones destined for the trash are instead turned into crispy roasted potato peels, stir fried broccoli stems and an awesome all-purpose chicken broth.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: The Big Till
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making an easy and hearty lunch for the Hagen family farmers, and she's using some of her favorite pantry staples- with a twist.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Cook Once, Eat for a Week
programme.desc: On Sundays, Valerie Bertinelli loves to make a big pot of her Nonnie's favourite marinara sauce and repurpose it all week in modern interpretations of her Nonnie's most-memorable weeknight meals.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Fancy for Less
programme.desc: Kardea invites her notoriously frugal Aunt TC over for a dinner that looks like a million bucks but won't break the bank! For their fancy meal at home, Kardea makes Molasses Salmon, Mushroom and Pea Risotto, and Wilted Bok Choy.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Pastabilities
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis invites friends into her kitchen to create their own pasta shapes from scratch and enjoy a pasta party together. In Italy, many families invent their own pasta shapes, but the recipes often aren't written down and are lost over time.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Money-Saving Madness
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts compete to make flavor-packed dishes that don't break the bank, like Geoffrey Zakarian's bucatini al limone and Sunny Anderson's red beans and rice with sausage. Blogger Deb Perelman stops by to make her bake sale winning-est bars.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Indulge Me
programme.desc: The recruits enter boot camp and find out that the theme is indulgence. Their first lesson is that salads can be indulgent, too, and the recruits play a game where salad elements are tossed into a bowl on their teammate's head.

programme.title: Chopped: Eat Your Veggies
programme.desc: Martha Stewart, the queen of farm-to-table cooking, is excited to judge a competition with gorgeous garden goodies in every basket. In the first round, the chefs find some impressive greens and a sweet treat.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: The Collector
programme.desc: When Vic accidentally loses one of Val’s prized coins, Val makes a deal with a mysterious antiques collector. She means to replace it, but the deal has terrible consequences.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Los Cadejos
programme.desc: Val holds a grudge against Vic, unwittingly attracting an evil cadejo, a mythological wolf-like beast.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Cuddle Monster
programme.desc: After being told by Chata that they can’t get a pet, Vic & Val adopt a wild lizard, unaware of its magical properties, and decide to keep it a secret from Chata.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Boss for a Day
programme.desc: When Chata lets Vic be the boss of the taco stand for the day Vic decides to fire Val, which has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Triangle/ The Money
programme.desc: Darwin joins the school marching band, and his tin-whistle talent lands him the solo. Gumball misses having his friend to goof off with and tries to get rehearsal cancelled.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Return
programme.desc: It’s the first day back at school, but Gumball and Darwin are nowhere to be seen.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Routine
programme.desc: Dad spends the day alone and the secrets of his daily routine are revealed.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Nemesis
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin come face-to-face with their arch-nemesis -- or at least someone who’s trying to be.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Parking
programme.desc: It takes the Wattersons a little longer than they thought it would to find the perfect parking space at the mall.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Crew
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin attempt to join the baddest crew in town.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Upgrade
programme.desc: Bobert is encouraged to update his computer's operating system by Gumball and Darwin, but things don't go so well.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Selfish Shellfish
programme.desc: Apple and Onion have to prove that they’re not selfish when they do their good deeds.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Sausage and Sweetie Smash
programme.desc: Apple and Onion must conquer their obsessions of sausages and a video game.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Pancake's Bus Tour
programme.desc: Apple and Onion go on a guided bus tour as part of their plan to get Apple's shoe back.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Block Party
programme.desc: A mean duck takes over the building's roof, so Apple and Onion have to outsmart him.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Goku Vanishes Into Space! Welcome Home, Super Warriors!
programme.desc: Frieza and Namek have both been defeated. Meanwhile, the whereabouts of Goku remain a mystery. How will Earth carry on without its Super Saiyan hero?

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Where Does the Dream Pick Up? Find the Super Saiyan God!
programme.desc: Knowing Goku, the Supreme Kais tell King Kai not to let him find out about Beerus; spoiler alert: he finds out about Beerus. Meanwhile, Bulma plans an epic birthday bash on a giant cruise ship, Vegeta might even show up.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Boywatch
programme.desc: Tina decides to join the Junior Lifeguards, but when she struggles with the training, one of her fellow junior guards, Parker, tries to convince her to quit. Meanwhile, business booms when Bob and Linda offer free wi-fi at the restaurant.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: As I Walk Through the Alley of the Shadow of Ramps
programme.desc: When a malicious juice truck owner tries to set up shop in the Belcher's alley, Louise devises a plan to win back their turf. Meanwhile, Linda learns that she can't always run to her sister's defense.

programme.title: Family Guy: Fighting Irish
programme.desc: Peter claims he would beat Liam Neeson in a fight, but when he is put to the test, he learns that winning is tougher than it seems. Meanwhile, Stewie becomes jealous when Lois decides to be a class mom and pays more attention to the other kids.

programme.title: Family Guy: Take My Wife
programme.desc: Lois books a fun couple's vacation in the Bahamas, but much to Peter's surprise, it turns out to be a marriage counseling program instead.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Red Riot
programme.desc: After Izuku Midoriya is bestowed with a 'quirk,' he enrolls in a super hero high school.

programme.title: Dr. Stone: To Modernity

programme.desc: Kirito finds himself in a new virtual world of which he is unable to log out of.

programme.title: Fire Force: A Brother's Determination
programme.desc: A superhuman firefighter is created to handle supernatural fire incidents.

programme.title: Black Clover: The Lives of the Village in the Sticks

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Web
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin give Nicole a crash course in computers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stink
programme.desc: Mr. Small goes feral after Gumball and Darwin expose his hypocrisy.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Agent
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin’s clothes go missing after a swimming lesson, and Gumball is forced to wear a tuxedo from the lost and found office. He believes it makes him look like a certain dapper British secret agent.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Ad
programme.desc: The Wattersons are forced to rent their house to a pair of elderly fainting goats.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: Planet-Ception/ United We Stand
programme.desc: The final showdown between Tiko and AO with the future of Earth and Vestroia in balance. The Awesome Ones return home as heroes, wondering what battles await them in the future.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Finally a Lesson
programme.desc: Robin finally teaches the other Titans a very valuable lesson.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Fish Water
programme.desc: Starfire wins a goldfish at the carnival and vows to keep it alive.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Arms Race With Legs
programme.desc: When her teammates turn evil, it's up to Lady Legasus to stop the League of Legs.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Shrimps and Prime Rib
programme.desc: The Titans try to remember how to be superheroes in order to stop The Brain.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Obinray
programme.desc: The Titans start speaking Pig Latin to prevent Robin from eavesdropping.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Halloween vs. Christmas
programme.desc: When Santa tries to take over Halloween, it’s up to the Titans and a few ghouls to stop him.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Batman vs. Teen Titans: Dark Injustice
programme.desc: The Titans try to outprank each other on April Fools' Day.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Booby Trap House
programme.desc: After being left alone at home, Cyborg and Starfire booby-trap the Tower for safety.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Wally T
programme.desc: The Titans discover the magic of 'fan strength' thanks to their number one fan, Wally T!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight
programme.desc: Batman and Commissioner Gordon check in on various happenings around Jump City.

programme.desc: While in Tokyo, Team Tennyson comes face to face with a horrible secret. While on a visit to the Sumo Slammers Amusement Park, Team Tennyson gets to watch a genuine sumo wrestling match.

programme.title: Power Players: Sand Trap
programme.desc: Axel and the team take to the desert dunes of a playground sandbox as Madcap attempts to unearth an army of Spy Lizards from the same line as Galileo.

programme.title: Power Players: Dodge City
programme.desc: Axel embraces the spirit of dodgeball to stop Madcap and Princess SugarSalt’s battle over who is the better villain from spilling over into Zoe and Cleo’s argument over who is the better coach.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Teen Titans Go Classic Easter Holiday Special
programme.desc: The Easter Bunny is missing, and it's up to the Titans to find him before Easter is ruined.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: BBSFBDAY!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Rad Dudes With Bad Tudes
programme.desc: After seeing a pair of cool dudes on rollerblades, Robin tries to be just like them.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Teen Titans Save Christmas

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: History Lesson

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Inner Beauty of a Cactus

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Art of Ninjutsu
programme.desc: The Titans train Beast Boy to be a stealthy ninja as them in order to acquire a well sought-after artifact known as 'the McGuffin.'

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Movie Night
programme.desc: It’s Movie Night, and the Titans have a hard time deciding who gets to choose which movie they watch.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Others

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Comic

programme.desc: Gumball sets out to prove to Penny's father that he's good enough for his daughter.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #ScrambledEggs
programme.desc: Thanks to a home economics assignment, the students are paired up and given an egg to “care for” over a weekend. But when tragedy befalls egg after egg, what should be an easy assignment escalates into a madcap romp with super-high stakes!

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #DramaQueen
programme.desc: Oliver Queen must face off against his greatest rival yet, Mortimer Drake, while Green Arrow also finds himself up against a new foe, The Cavalier.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan try to keep laughing so they won't start crying as their motorcycle shop goes out of business. Meanwhile, Becky's boyfriend Mark is offered a fabulous job in another state, so they decide to elope.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to lift Dan's spirits when he feels like a failure over the loss of his motorcycle shop. Also, Becky and Mark return from their elopement to face a bitter Dan and Roseanne.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Madame and Her Special Friend
programme.desc: Alan strikes up a friendship with Charlie's elderly neighbour, Norma, only to find himself on the defensive as she tries to win his affections. Meanwhile, Charlie tries to dissuade Jake from donating money to a televangelist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something Salted and Twisted
programme.desc: Alan has a family dinner to celebrate the publication of a newspaper article that calls him a 'good doctor, neighbour and guy,' but he's crushed when his mother is not impressed. After drowning his sorrow in many drinks, he has a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan drop Jake off at a friend's house and head out for some sibling bonding at the movies, but their night is ruined when Alan freaks out after convincing himself that Jake was too eager to spend the weekend away from him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Humiliation Is a Visual Medium
programme.desc: No one believes Charlie when he says that his relationship with Mia is getting serious, and everyone really thinks he's lost it when he confesses that they have been dating for more than a month and haven't consummated the relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Love Isn't Blind, It's Retarded
programme.desc: Charlie plans a romantic date with Mia in the hopes of finally consummating their relationship. Meanwhile, Alan starts dating Kandi, Charlie's most recent ex-girlfriend, who is half his age.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Tongue Is Meat
programme.desc: Charlie can't keep pace with the healthy lifestyle that Mia has introduced to their relationship, so he sneaks cigars and beers in the garage. When Mia busts him for lying, Charlie has to figure out if he's just whipped or truly in love.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Unfortunate Little Schnauser
programme.desc: Charlie boycotts an advertising awards banquet, having lost several years in a row to his cocky arch nemesis Archie. After devising a ploy to get him to attend, Alan, Evelyn and Jake accompany Charlie for support, until they get to know Archie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Spit-Covered Cobbler
programme.desc: When Kandi's old car breaks down, Alan ends up leasing her a new one. Charlie warns him to break things off with her, but when Alan spends his last dime on Kandi's root canal and can't pay Judith's alimony, Charlie is forced to cover for him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: And the Plot Moistens
programme.desc: Jake's teacher, Francine, calls Alan and Judith in to discuss Jake's lack of interest in school. Desperate to communicate with someone intelligent while continuing to see his airhead girlfriend, Kandi, Alan starts a platonic relationship with Francine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Once With Aunt Sophie
programme.desc: When a cute girl from Jake's school invites him to a party, Charlie butts in on Alan's milestone moment with his son by offering his own words of wisdom on women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Arguments for the Quickie
programme.desc: When Charlie finds out that Mia is in town with her dance troupe, he opts not to see her and tries to convince Alan that he's over her. Charlie gets another surprise when Mia explains that she wants something personal from him, his sperm.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Pistol-Packin' Hermaphrodite
programme.desc: Wedding bells loom as Charlie and Mia make their wedding plans, but when their families meet, things immediately begin to fall apart. Ultimately, Charlie and his bride-to-be end up deciding on a small ceremony in Vegas.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Working for Caligula
programme.desc: Now that newlywed Alan has moved out, Charlie returns to his bachelor lifestyle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Who Is This Vod Kanockers?
programme.desc: Alan feels guilty when he learns that Charlie and Mia didn't tie the knot because she had wanted him and Jake to move out. Meanwhile, Charlie and his rock star neighbour don't get along.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Sea Is a Harsh Mistress
programme.desc: Charlie tries surfing in order to impress a beautiful girl, with disastrous results. He later tells Alan that when his life was hanging in the balance, their deceased father came to him and made a request that Charlie is reluctant to fulfill.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pot-Smoking Monkey
programme.desc: Alan is determined to gain custody of his and Kandi's dog after she walks away from their split with both the condo and the car. Having also lost everything to Judith following their divorce, Alan decides to hire her lawyer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Live Woman of Proven Fertility
programme.desc: Alan is overjoyed that he'll no longer owe Judith alimony when she marries Herb. When their marriage plans are threatened due to Jake's disdain for his soon-to-be-stepfather, Alan enlists Charlie's help to keep Herb from getting cold feet.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Big Bad Woods
programme.desc: Anything can happen in Maine's 17 million acres of rugged wilderness. Angry hunters get loud with Warden Lounder over an illegal deer. Warden MacCabe enlists a 90-year-old local to help catch a deer baiter. A missing hunter sets off a full-scale search.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: A stolen ATV steers Parker through a maze of suspects. Carter races to a domestic violence dispute. Marquis and Fitzpatrick set up a sting for a suspected night hunter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hunting the Hunters
programme.desc: Officers Adam Cheney and Geoff Pushee run into an aggressive and angry hunter while investigating a road hunting complaint.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.desc: Officer Canfield meets a feisty swimmer looking for a fight. Anger reaches a boiling point when Officers Pushee and McKee ticket a dozen unruly ATV violators at once. And as Officer McKee monitors a sleeping bear, it becomes dangerously aggravated.

programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Boy in Blue
programme.desc: On April 28th, 2010, 12-year-old Alajawan Brown is gunned down outside a 7-Eleven in Skyway, Washington, a block from an earlier shooting. As police question if the two are related, only CCTV can help piece together the puzzle and ID Alajawan's killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Vanished at Noon
programme.desc: On November 26th, 2014, Jessica Padgett disappears. The only lead is her abandoned white Subaru. Surveillance cameras show her driving into a parking lot and walking down a back alley, never to return.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Red Jacket
programme.desc: On Valentine's night, 2015, 27-year-old James Enright is stabbed to death outside a busy train station in Burnaby, Canada. Despite cell phone footage of the attack, police struggle to identify his killer, until CCTV leads them to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: My House, My Revenge
programme.desc: A couple moves to an idyllic California beach town and hits it off with their new neighbors. The wives are particularly friendly, until one of them descends into drugs and madness, terrorizing and turning murderous intent upon the other.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Burn Neighbor, Burn
programme.desc: In peaceful Alden, New York, siblings who live in neighboring houses get into a conflict when their prodigal brother returns home. Soon, the family is at each other's throats until their war finally comes to a shocking, fiery end.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What Happened to Abby?
programme.desc: A teen vanishes on her way home from school. Weeks later a puzzling letter from her arrives in the mail. This is the story of a desperate search for a girl hidden in plain sight, and her tale of bravery and resilience in the face of terror.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Black Widow
programme.desc: Stacey Castor has lost not just one, but two, husbands. Then someone leaves a suicide note saying they are responsible for their deaths. And a mother and daughter become pitted against each other as jurors must determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: A 15-year-old girl relies on Facebook to stay in contact and keep up with the latest gossip. After accepting a few friend requests from boys she doesn't know, Nichole agrees to meet one of them and discovers the truth behind their online friendship.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Brilliant schoolboy Breck Bednar has a passion for computers and gaming. But when he's introduced to a successful entrepreneur online, passion turns to obsession and the game becomes deadly.

programme.title: Web of Lies: New Year's Retribution
programme.desc: A newly single 33-year-old bursting with confidence after losing 200 pounds spends her time flirting with men online. When she fails to turn up for work one day, her friends worry that she didn't just run away with Mr. Right.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: Body Cam: Cover Me
programme.desc: Two police officers respond to a domestic disturbance that ends in tragedy. A terrifying house fire turns into a murder investigation. The search for a known sex offender builds to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Body Cam: High Stakes
programme.desc: A Detective leads his heavily armed team on a search warrant but ends up in the firing line himself; a routine traffic stop turns violent as the suspect makes a risky getaway; a knife wielding man draws police into a dangerous foot chase.

programme.title: Body Cam: Under Siege
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, a domestic dispute ends in tragedy when two deputies are trapped with a gun-wielding suspect; in Iowa, a high-speed pursuit escalates to a gruesome conclusion.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill its Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Seth Bullock: Sheriff of Deadwood
programme.desc: In Deadwood, a mining camp swirling with violence and vice, Seth Bullock is the only stabilizing force standing in the way of utter chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Doubleheader
programme.desc: Mark splits up his crew so they can conquer two jobs at the same time. Johnny and Tim take down a big tobacco barn that has plenty of antique material worth salvaging, while Graham and Alex tackle a log cabin that's still in great shape.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving More than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save the antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress. During the job they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Larry Melton's Chance of a Lifetime
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders, after once saving Larry Melton's childhood home, do something they've never done before. They invite Larry to the Boneyard to help restore his family home. Mark also arranges a final surprise with some very special guests.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Restored: 1906 Arts and Crafts House
programme.desc: Brett is called upon to restore a historically significant 1906 arts and crafts home. He brings it back to its original glory by reintroducing the closed-in fireplaces, re-instating the floor plan and replacing the 1980s kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: A daughter and mother call on Brett to restore a 1927 arts and crafts house that's lost some character over the years. While restoring the home, Brett unexpectedly discovers a hidden masterpiece.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics III: Creole in a Bowl
programme.desc: Alton looks at the cultures that influenced New Orleans beans and rice.

programme.title: Good Eats: Undercover Veggies
programme.desc: To tempt his niece into eating her vegetables, Alton sneaks them into several meals.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics VII: Don't Be Chicken of Dumplings
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes on the classic American soup that divides the country, and his family.

programme.title: Good Eats: It's a Pan, It's a Dish, It's Paella
programme.desc: Alton Brown demystifies the Spanish pan and the rice dish for which it is famous.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Flay vs. Stone

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto Vs. Hines

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Sutherland
