programme.title: Unique Eats: Food Fantasy
programme.desc: Imagination roams free at these amazing dining spots.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Americana
programme.desc: Classic American fare gets the royal treatment at these extraordinary spots. Heavy-Metal inspired burgers piled high with the works and mouth-watering, stick-to-your-ribs barbecue in Brooklyn are featured.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Great Spaces
programme.desc: Take a tour of the most unique places and spaces in dining today. From a food truck serving the most delectable Korean/Mexican dishes on four wheels, to a LEED-certified bowling-alley-come-music-venue boasting it's own special Blue Ribbon menu.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Desserts such as donuts that raid the savory spice cabinet, roasted pepper gelato.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Small Bites
programme.desc: Stacked baklava and creative candies from Queens and Brooklyn, tiny treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Chocolate
programme.desc: If a love for chocolate can be described as a religion, we have found the ultimate places of worship that claim devotion to little else. Atop the shrine to this beloved ingredient sits a collection of playful chocolate confections.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Pigging Out
programme.desc: From sweet and salty Cuban sandwiches and zesty whole hog barbecue to mild kielbasa and melt-in-your-mouth cured ham, Andrew Zimmern explores all the best ways we pig out on the world's most popular meat - pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New York City
programme.desc: New York City is a melting pot of various ethnicities and culinary fusion. Andrew explores the iconic foods from the Big Apple like mile-high pastrami sandwiches, bagels and lox, pizza by the slice and the American hamburger.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Tall Order Of Cakes
programme.desc: Molly goes under the big top to create a cake design that will raise funds for a local charity. Ben uses his skills as a former tattoo artist to make a permanent good impression for his clients.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Prince Of Cakes
programme.desc: Prince Charles gives his royal approval to Phil and Christine's cakes. While Eloise challenges herself with a cake of gigantic proportions, Molly shows Manchester United pride in her latest cake creation.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Beer, Bling And Spinning Cakes
programme.desc: A brewery celebration calls for kegs made of cake that actually pour beer, and a huge, edible sombrero is filled with food and flames!

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Big Ben and Wearable Hat Cakes
programme.desc: London comes to Las Vegas in a wedding shower creation that's ready for high tea, then cake and ice cream get a whole new meaning. Plus, a spinning masterpiece shines like crystals but is completely edible.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes for the Queen
programme.desc: It will be a British Invasion of the sweet kind when four English bakers fight for the chance to have their cupcakes featured at an exclusive party celebrating Queen Elizabeth's Diamond Jubilee.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Are You Happy Now?

programme.desc: Bob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; meeting Sandy for tea.

programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons
programme.desc: After a freak jousting accident at a Medieval Times restaurant, SpongeBob and Patrick are transported to a medieval version of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Time Flies/ Prank Calls
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back. A prank call by Alvin gets out of hand when the person on the other end of the line vows to track him down.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtledega Nights: The Ballad of Rat Man/ The Ancient Art of Ninja Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: You Got Served/ How to Make Enemies and Bend People to Your Will
programme.desc: Leo and Mikey get sidetracked by a brotherly competition while helping Señor Hueso. And, Baron Draxum struggles to move up in the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: We're The Chipmunks/ Save the Dance
programme.desc: When a new boy band, 'The Hipmunks,' tries to steal the spotlight, the Chipmunks are forced to compete in a battle of the bands.The Principal gives Alvin and Derek an ultimatum. If they fight, the school dance will be canceled.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Sky Police/ Father's Day Parade
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: 3, 2, 1/ Shirley Keeper
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars launch fever.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: A Fish Story!
The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Sushi Sitter/ Cheer Beast
programme.desc: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Mad Wax/ Fails
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are attacked by wax figures at the Celebrity Wax Museum. And, Brad posts embarrassing videos of Captain Man and Kid Dangers until they turn him invisible again.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Movie: Astro Boy
programme.desc: After the death of his son, a scientist designs a robot to replace him. The robot's incredible powers make him a well-known superhero and the only thing that can save Earth from aliens.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop, and Burn, Part I
programme.desc: When 14 year old Leo moves into his new stepdad’s mansion, he snoops around and discovers Adam, Bree, and Chase, three bionic siblings living in a lab beneath the house.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop, and Burn, Part II
programme.desc: After discovering the mayhem his Lab Rats have caused at the high school, Davenport decides to send them away to a remote secret lab.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo's Jam
programme.desc: When Leo needs help asking a girl to the school dance, Adam and Chase step in to help, but the plan backfires when she falls for the wrong brother. The boys decide to settle their differences on the dance floor and each show off their best moves.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Rats on a Train
programme.desc: The Lab Rats get their first mission to stop Davenport's hi-tech super fast train from speeding out of control. When they discover that Leo accidentally discarded the braking system they were supposed to install, they are forced to improvise.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Birthday Fail
programme.desc: Adam, Bree, and Chase, who have never had a birthday party of their own, get so caught up in throwing a surprise party for Leo that they forget to invite him to it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Death Spiral Smackdown
programme.desc: Leo teams up with Adam in a school fitness challenge, hoping that Adam's bionic powers will be his secret weapon. But the plan backfires when they end up going head-to-head in the finals.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Can I Borrow the Helicopter?
programme.desc: After a few failed attempts at impressing Janelle, Leo borrows Davenport's high-speed helicopter to take her on a daring date. Meanwhile, Bree decides to move out of the lab and into her own room.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chip Switch
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase defy warnings from Davenport and swap bionic chips with bad results.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chore Wars
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase learn about chores and earn an allowance for the first time, then decide to host a yard sale to raise more money.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Dude, Where's My Lab?
programme.desc: Tasha takes the entire family on a nice tech free beach weekend in the RV, but when Davenport discovers a solar flare headed in the Earth's direction, he secretly enlists the help of the Lab Rats.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: Beyond
programme.desc: With the help of a new team, the Avengers must reunite to save the universe.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: Underworld
programme.desc: As they search for the Bifrost and a way to undo Battleworld, the Avengers must battle the Enchantress.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: The Immortal Weapon
programme.desc: While trying to retrieve Heimdall's sword, Black Panther and Falcon team up with Iron Fist to overcome symbiote-powered Dracula and his vampires.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: The Vibranium Coast
programme.desc: Ant-Man and Ms. Marvel must team up with the pirate Typhoid Mary to battle Red Skull and Crossbones.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Epic Voyage Battleship Cruise
programme.desc: Aiger, Hae-jin, and Cap’n hop aboard the Battleship Cruise. Aiger will have to face off against friend and foe if he wants a shot at battling World Champion.

programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Top Dogs
programme.desc: Students learn to care for exotic animals at a Teaching Zoo. A San Francisco dog rescue helps senior dogs find home. Plus, avalanche rescue dogs on patrol.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Light Up Paint
programme.desc: Alie shows us: The Biker Dudes who've invented elaborate pain that lights up, the innovator making sure you stand up straight, the woman who took her grandmother's tea recipe to make food last long, the inventors of a printer that fits in your pocket.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel: This Is Busan, South Korea
programme.desc: Viewers are encouraged to break out the passport and explore cultures around the world.

programme.title: Wipeout: Knock Knock, Who's There? Wipeout
programme.desc: Obstacles featured include moving big balls, the door knock and the pendulum.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Bust Out Comedy
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Movie: The Big Green
programme.desc: A teacher and an athlete transform a rag-tag team of misfits into a winning soccer team.

programme.title: Movie: The Ringer
programme.desc: In order to slide out from beneath a mound of debt, a nice young man decides to rig the Special Olympics by posing as a contestant.

programme.title: Movie: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: When their mutual best friends die, two single adults find themselves named as guardians of their friend's orphaned daughter.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali: Fighting Spirit

programme.title: Liquid Lunch With John Tabacco: The Best Shots of Liquid Lunch
programme.desc: Markets, news, and politics shaken and served with a twist everyday LIVE on Newsmax!

programme.title: Conversations With Nancy Brinker: Stephen A. Schwarzman
programme.desc: Nancy Brinker talks to some of the nation’s most powerful and influential personalities.

programme.title: Stand Up Trump: Making America Fun Again
programme.desc: Donald Trump is unlike any other American president. America has finally witnessed a commander-in-chief who doesn't just go off script, but just goes off.

programme.title: Huckabee
programme.desc: Join Mike Huckabee for no agenda news, positive entertainment and everyday stories that inspire.

programme.title: American Moses: The Charlton Heston Story
programme.desc: Moses to Michelangelo, civil rights leader to astronaut on Planet of the Apes, Charlton Heston was always more than a Hollywood star. With a career spanning 60 years & a hundred films, he was a cultural warrior & never backed down from controversy.

programme.title: Bob Hope: Thanks for the Laughs
programme.desc: Filmmakers take a look at the career of legendary entertainer Bob Hope as they showcase his best moments. From Hollywood to American troops overseas, Hope kept people smiling.

programme.title: Mega Disasters: New York Earthquake
programme.desc: People don't think of New York City as a place where earthquakes may happen, but in the past they have on two separate occasions. An earthquake in this city will strand people and collapse buildings and generally wreak havoc on the city.

programme.title: D-Day: Lost Films
programme.desc: Witness the largest amphibious assault in history, in which 5,000 allied ships landed over 160,000 soldiers on the beaches of Normandy. Includes never before seen colour footage and personal accounts of soldiers from both sides.

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie: The Plot to Kill Hitler
programme.desc: Operation Valkyrie is the definitive film on Claus Schenk Graf von Stauffenberg and the doomed 'Valkyrie' conspiracy to assassinate Hitler on July 20, 1944.

programme.title: Decoding the Past: Nazi Prophecies
programme.desc: From biblical times prophecies have painted a chilling portrait of Hitler's rise and fall.

programme.title: Victory at Sea
programme.desc: A look at WWII's combat at sea, putting you front and center to all the action.

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley: Experiencing a Faith Failure
programme.desc: The ministry of Dr. Charles Stanley of the First Baptist Church of Atlanta, Georgia.

programme.title: Bible Secrets Revealed: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: From the moral codes of the Old Testament to the apocalyptic predictions from the Book of Revelation, find answers to age-old questions.

programme.title: The Men Who Killed Kennedy: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Explore the new details, and the countless questions regarding the death of John Fitzgerald Kennedy, our 35th president.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World
programme.desc: Proclaiming to the world the good news of Jesus Christ's coming kingdom and teaching original Christianity as taught and practiced by Jesus Christ and the original Apostles.

programme.title: Income Generation
programme.desc: Learn about purposed-based investing for Americans born before 1966.

programme.title: Huckabee
programme.desc: Join Mike Huckabee for no agenda news, positive entertainment and everyday stories that inspire.

programme.title: Secret Access: The Vatican
programme.desc: Take a revealing look at the inner workings of the Vatican including the secret archives, the Swiss guards, and many other secrets that are locked inside.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: House of Spirits
programme.desc: When Vanessa gives Mike a history of their house for his birthday, they discover that a woman who once lived there over 100 years earlier died upstairs. Ed claims to never have cash on him, and keeps borrowing from the money-strapped Kyle.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Adrenaline
programme.desc: When Mike gets 2011 NASCAR Sprint Cup Series champion Tony Stewart and his racecar to jazz up the Outdoor Man retail space, Mike realizes more than ever how much he misses the adrenaline rush he used to get from his adventures on the road.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Smell the Umbrella Stand
programme.desc: Charlie tries to take Alan to Las Vegas in order to distract him from a medical procedure.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Eat Human Flesh With Wooden Teeth?
programme.desc: A stressed Judith goes to Hawaii, leaving Jake with Alan and Charlie for an entire week.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Girl From Poughkeepsie
programme.desc: Ross struggles to maintain a long-distance relationship with a girl from Poughkeepsie.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Invitation
programme.desc: As Ross and Emily make plans for their London wedding, Ross debates inviting Rachel.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Fish for Breakfast
programme.desc: In an effort to boost their chances of getting pregnant, Molly encourages Mike to join her in giving up caffeine and eating healthier, causing them both to have major withdrawals.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly's Birthday
programme.desc: Mike prepares to spoil Molly for her birthday, but his plans go awry after he eats psychedelic gelato made by Victoria's friend Tom.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Zejdz Zmoich Wlosow
programme.desc: When an earthquake bursts the water pipes in Judith's home, Alan invites her to say with him at Charlie's.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Those Big Pink Things With Coconuts
programme.desc: Evelyn takes drastic measures to get back into the lives of her sons and grandson.

programme.title: Mom: Pre-washed Lettuce and a Mime
programme.desc: Christy has second thoughts about law school after a tough first day, and Bonnie is plagued by an upsetting dream.

programme.title: Mom: Go-Go Boots and a Butt Cushion
programme.desc: When Christy decides she doesn’t need Gambler’s Anonymous anymore, Bonnie vehemently disagrees.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Embryos
programme.desc: Phoebe tries to beat the odds to get pregnant so she can become a surrogate mother.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Crush
programme.desc: Rachel is demoted to a personal shopper but is comforted when she assists a cute customer.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Dirty Day
programme.desc: Joey gets a film role but is in hot water when he is caught showering in a dressing room.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Rugby
programme.desc: Ross agrees to play a game of rugby to impress Emily and her athletic English pals.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Snow Way
programme.desc: People discover it's not so easy to go dashing through the snow, field reporters realize they should have stayed in the studio and bears come out of hibernation and get into trouble.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: When It Rains It Pours
programme.desc: A bikini model slips on the runway, a boater slips overboard, and a weather person has an embarrassing slip of the tongue.

programme.title: Wipeout: Boss and Employee 2012
programme.desc: Employees and their bosses team up and learn that getting to the top is no simple task when they attempt to climb the 'Corporate Ladder' together.

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters: Dave Warnock
programme.desc: A discussion with leading freethought authors, thinkers and activists.

programme.title: Elementary: Snow Angels
programme.desc: Sherlock and Joan try to prevent a robbery from one of the largest cash vaults in the country during the middle of a Nor'easter. Meanwhile, Sherlock tries to help a transgender woman who is recovering from her latest breakup.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Adam Spielberg
programme.desc: Adam loves director Steven Spielberg so much and decides to film an original script he wrote about Indiana Jones and his passion for directing is called into question.
